faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom degree at Starex University?
faqs.answer:
Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Starex University can apply to any government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries:
Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA
LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA
IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA
RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA
SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA
IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA
Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

faqs.question: Does Starex University follow semester pattern for MBA programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, the DPharma course at Starex University follows the semester pattern. It offers DPharma with a two-year course duration where the students complete the coursework in more than one Pharmatics discipline. However, there are two semesters in an DPharma academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments are smoothly run throughout. A semester-wise format offers students the added ability to handle workloads in the semesters of the DPharma programme.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying BPharm at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University BPharmacy fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, caution deposits, admission fees, alumni charges, library membership, etc. The total tuition fee for the four-year course is INR 3 lakh and the hostel charges are up to INR 96,000 and one-time fee is INR 5,000. This given tuition fee is as per the Haryana State Technical Education Society and is calculated as per the first-year semester fee. Hence, the amount may vary.

faqs.question: What is the placement rate at Starex University?
faqs.answer:
During 2023 placements, 49% of the BPharma batch was placed. Earlier, 57% of the BPharma batch was placed in 2022. The table below compares the Starex University placement rate for 2022 and 2023:
Course Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023)
BPharma 57% 49%
NOTE: The above percentage is calculated from the details given in the NIRF report 2024.

college_info.intro:
Starex University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university gives a BTech programme in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, CSE, Cyber Security & Digital Forensics, Cyber Security, Azure Data, Cloud & AI Developer, and others. It is a full-time, four-year programme, spanning over 8 semesters. BTech students can work as Database Administrator, Software Developer, Data Scientist, Cyber Security Analyst, and others.
Starex University offers a two-year MBA programme. The MBA curriculum offered at the university includes case studies, industry projects and internship opportunities for the students. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Finance Managers, Marketing Research Analysts, Business Analyst, Investment Banker, and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by Starex University:

faqs.answer: A:    Starex University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on a test conducted by the university. The university also conducts a personal interview round for selection. Aspirants are first required to apply for their preferred course and then participate in the selection rounds for admission.
faqs.question: Can I join STAREX University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Starex University eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility criteria for top Starex University courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with PCM as compulsory subjects with at least 45% aggregateMBABachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and Biology/ Mathematics with at least 45% aggregateBCAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregateBAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregate

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Radio and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I think there are no good placements here. I did not see or hear from any student about this.

review_content.Placements: A very few students attend the college regularly. Teachers do not come to the classroom. Students go for internships at their own risk. The college treats internships as a very last option, because it seems like the paramedics course is a waste in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in classes or labs, and the classrooms are not cleaned properly. It is cleaned only once a week. It is in very poor condition, with a school-type desk, and there is no proper seating at the desk. It is very painful, I daily think why I should go to college or waste money, one should opt for this college at their own risk.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in CSE (AI & ML) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Pretty decent college with good infrastructure and average placement ratio.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio of Starex University is not very good; maybe 2 out of 10 students get placed on average. The highest package is somewhere around 10 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Most of the students are hired by new startups and some of the MNCs like Wipro, TCS, etc. The internship ratio is very low; 1 out of 10 get a paid internship here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decently good at Starex University. It gives a foreign university vibe. Classrooms and the library are well-maintained, and no Wi-Fi is allowed for students. The hostel is also decent with all the required facilities. The hostel warden is very good and supportive.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good until we talk about placements.

review_content.Placements: Only, on average, 20% of students get placed. The highest package is around 320000 and the lowest package is 120000. Companies like Cipla, Medicament, etc. are the top recruiters. 60 to 70 percent students get internship in various companies like Medicament, etc. Roles offered are quality control, analysis, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our department, like WiFi, labs, classrooms and libraries. Our classroom has ACs. The hostel facility was also good; the food was not bad. On our campus, we have a hospital so medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. All types of sports are available in our college like football, cricket, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: College gives the best experience.

review_content.Placements: The placement process starts with NASSCOM, which has a tie-up with the University, providing perfect training for placements. Once we train and reach the final year, placements start with big firms like Accenture, IBM, Merkle, Seagate, Deloitte, and Amazon conducting campus interviews. The salary package is different for all companies, with the highest being 15 LPA and the average being 5-6 LPA. In our batch, the college did not provide internships. They tried their best; maybe they can start internships from this year. Roles depend on the company.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Previous year, 80% of students were placed in various companies.

review_content.Placements: For us (MBA ) end of 2nd semester we are eligible for placement drives but for a job after 3rd semester is complete the college will grant permission to join the job and also have an opportunity for an off-campus drive. Around 15 to 18 companies visited our college and around 75 to 80 percent of students got placement. Our courses the highest package is 14 lac and our course average package is around 5 lac. Some of the students make startups and join the jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Modern hostel facilities are provided separately for both boys and girls of the college. The rooms at the hostel have basic facilities and are fully furnished with furniture that helps the students to study and live there peaceful. The entire hostel is Wi-Fi enabled and has 24 into 7 electricity and water supply. Feels for the hostel are as follows- For AC rooms, single-sharing rooms cost around 1.3 Lacs per year. Twin sharing 1.2 Lacs per year. Triple sharing 1.1 Lacs per year. For AC rooms, twin sharing is 1 Lacs per year, and for triple sharing, it is 90000 per year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Radio and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA. Paras Hospital, Global Hospital, and many more visit our college to recruit students. Almost 60% of students got internships. Our teachers are supportive. They organise many trips to hospitals and companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are good. A huge library is available in our college. The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel is good. The staff members are good. Our campus is spacious. We have a cafeteria. Our college is ragging-free. It has greenery. It is situated outside the city.

admission_overview.college_name: Starex University Course Admissions 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Selection, Application Process, Placements

paragraphs: Starex University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes.Starex Universityoffers more than 48 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The university offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the application form online.

The university offers courses in full-time mode through 12 schools. BPharm, BTech and MBA are some of the popular courses offered by the university. Below are the key highlights forStarex University admissions:
Particulars
Starex University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://www.starexuniversity.com/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Starex University Course Details

The university offers admission based on a test or personal interview round. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularStarex University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Starex University opens the registration portal as a first step of the admission process. Candidates are first required to apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: Starex University Application Process 2025

Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice via online mode. Aspirants will need to register with the basic details to generate the login credentials. Candidates have to pay an application fee to register for a course at Starex University.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the application process is completed, the university starts selecting candidates for admission. The selection is based on test scores or performance in the personal interview round. Based on performance in the selection rounds, aspirants become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

After the final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. These students then need to get their documents verified and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University offers a two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics with academic support by IBM and Data Pioneers -Azure Ascendancy with academic support by Microsoft. Aspirants must complete bachelor's degree of a minimum of three-years with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MBA course.To know more about an MBA programme,click here.

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks required for MBA?
faqs.answer: The cutoff marks for the MBA for the general category will go around 97 to 100 percentile in the CAT Exam. This is for the top colleges IIM Calcutta, Ahmedabad etc.The minimum you need to score is 90 percentile to get admission to other colleges for MBA. It depends on the college and number of seats they are offering.

faqs.question: Can I join STAREX University directly?
faqs.answer: Starex University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on a test conducted by the university. The university also conducts a personal interview round for selection. Aspirants are first required to apply for their preferred course and then participate in the selection rounds for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility criteria for top Starex University courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with PCM as compulsory subjects with at least 45% aggregateMBABachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and Biology/ Mathematics with at least 45% aggregateBCAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregateBAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregate

faqs.question: Are admissions at STAREX University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Starex University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes. After final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. The shortlisted candidates then need to come for document verification and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA and what is the minimum University Entrance Exam percentage required?
faqs.answer: For the selection process for an MBA degree:You must have secured 50% in your bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years. For the Reserved category, it is 45%.For admission, you must have cleared any national-level exam like the CAT or you can opt for an entrance exam done by the university.After clearing the exam you will get a call for an interview. You will get admission only after clearing the interview.Entrance test weightage is 60% while for an interview it is 40%.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom degree at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Starex University can apply to any government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

paragraphs: Tution fee for B.Sc. i STAREX University is around 1.6L-3.9L, with the total including some more such as examination fees (and as per one's requirements) hostel and mess fees, with the average number going around 1.2L Per year for many students.So you must look at the expenses individually to decide whether you would have to spend some money there or not.

The fee for the Starex University Gurgaon MBA course is INR 3 lakh. This course fee is calculated on the basis of first-semester fees and includes components such as tuition fees. The candidates availing of the hostel facilities have to pay the hostel charges as well, which sums up to INR 2.25 lakh. In addition, the mentioned hostel fee is for Non-AC (3-Sharing) plus the security charges. At the time of application form filling, aspirants have to pay the application fee as well to submit the form successfully.

STAREX University is moderately costly if we see other factors side by side. The B.Tech fees at this University is around INR 3.2 lakh- 4.8 lakh and the MBA fees is also around INR 3 lakh. It can be said that the fees in not too much expensive but is expensive. Other colleges charge less fees than this as offer better ROI than this university. The average package offered is INR 10 LPA and average is INR 3 LPA. Seeing the return on fees invested, it's okay. So if  a student is trying to pursue any course from this university he/she should consider other factors also such as Facility, Infrastructure etc. and feedback from current students should also be taken.

The fee for all the various courses at the Starex university varies greatly depending upon the duration and specialisation of the program. Tution fee for MBA is around 3L Tution fee for MCA is around 1.4L Tution fee for B.Sc. is around 1.6L-3.9L Tution fee for B.Pharma is around 3L Tution fee for BPT is around 3.2L Tution fee for M.Sc. is around 1L-1.6L Tution fee for B.E./B.Tech is around 3.2L-4.8L
just to give some insights, One must look at official recent sources too as the values might change from time to time.

college_info.intro: NIF Global, Borivali offers all its programmes in two specialisations Fashion Design and Interior Design. The programmes offered at the institute are BDes, BVoc, MVoc, Certificate, Diploma and Advance Diploma programmes. Aspirants can choose admission into any of the programmes at the university with either of the specialisations. Candidates can have a look at the courses below to get an idea of NIF Borivali courses:

placements.overview: NIF Borivali offers Certificate, Diploma UG, and PG programmes to its students. These programmes are offered in only two specialisations: Fashion Design and Interior Design. At the UG level, the college offers BDes, BVoc courses. At the PG level, the college offers MVoc courses to students. The college also provides Diploma, Advanced Diploma and Certificate courses to its students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by NIF Borivali and their respective eligibility and NIF Borivali fee structure:

admission_overview.college_name: NIF Borivali Courses Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application Process

paragraphs: NIF Global, Borivali admission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers various courses such as BVoc, BDes, MVoc, etc. The selection criteria are merit-based. To get admitted to NIF Global Borivali, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process atNIF Global, Borivali, is conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutNIF Global, Borivalicourse admission2025.

NIF Global Borivali admissions are based on merit. The most popular programmes offered at NIF Global, Borivali, are BDes, BVoc, MVoc, Certificate, Diploma and Advance Diploma programmes. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularNIF Global, Borivali courses:

NIF Global, Borivali admission is a multi-step process. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. Candidates seeking admission to UG, PG, diploma, and certificate courses of the institute must go through a detailed admission process below:
Step 1: NIF Global, Borivali application process.
The admission process for NIF Global, Borivali, involves registration, and candidates must apply online through the college's official website and pay an application fee to complete the procedure.
Step 2: Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates must have passed Class 12 with a minimum 40% aggregate for admission to UG, diploma, and certificate courses and a graduation degree with 40% for admission to PG courses. The college releases the shortlisted candidates’ list based on their merits.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theNIF Global, Borivali feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

paragraphs: NIFD Global, Borivali has completed its placement drive for the class of 2022. As per the report, the institute recorded 90% placement rate in the academic year 2021-2022. The highest and average package offered during NIFD Global, Borivali placement 2022 stood at INR 3.6 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of NIFD Global, Borivali in 2022 included ZARA, Shoppers Stop, Kalki Fashion, Arvind Mills, US Polo, The Style Fleek, Mohri, Master Bespoke, Unkiyo Interiors, Scarlet Sage , etc.

content.Placements: Around 20 percent to 30 percent of students from our college get placed, with an average annual salary of Rs. 300,000. description: Deogiri College Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The Maharashtra CET Cell has released the MH CET Law cutoff 2025 for all rounds and categories for both the AI and HS quota candidates. In the first round, the cutoff percentile for admission to the B.A. LL.B. course was 67.74, while in the last round, the cutoff was 76.35 percentile.
Refer to the table below to know the first and last round cutoff data for the General AI category.

Deogiri College MH CET Law cutoff 2025 can be accessed in this section. Students can also view the past two year cutoff data, i.e., of 2024, and 2023. In 2025, the MH CET Law cutoff was 76.35 for B.A. LL.B. and programme in the last round.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filters.

Students can get an idea of the cutoff trends for the past three years, i.e., of 2025, 2024, and 2023 from the table provided below. Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated cutoff pdfs for future reference.

The Deogiri College MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 1.58. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 28.06 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Deogiri College was 1.58.
For other categories, candidates can use the provided filters.

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

Deogiri College MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 67.36 to 74.78 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.
For the General HS category, the cutoff range was 77.83 to 74.78. To know more cutoff information about other categories, rounds, and quotas, see the table below:

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 74.78. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, and 2023.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a positive experience with qualified faculty, good infrastructure, & decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers excellent facilities including WiFi well maintained classrooms and high quality food in the mess and canteen. It also provides medical services along with a dedicated sports and games department for students. The campus is clean organized and provides a comfortable learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nice.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are given good. Full facilities are given to the students. Wi-Fi, study labs, and tight security are available. College environment is good and fresh. Hostel warden's behaviour is so good. College canteen is also very good. The canteen is much big for students' requirements.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for poor students because of low fees.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the campus is very big. There are all types of departments as per the field of education, each with a different library, big classrooms with digital boards, canteen, and playground. Labs are available, but there is no Wi-Fi for students. In the hostel, the food is not well, and the mess is also not like home food.

reviews.review_heading: My college and their campus are the best in Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities available are labs, labs provided any books for the syllabus, and without the syllabus, examples of politicians, comedians, GK, etc. Classrooms are very well, but not provided with digital boards in my classroom and available library, etc. Mess and canteen are also available .

reviews.review_heading: Mine journey with Deogiri College.
reviews.review_text: Course infrastructure is great, as well as computer labs for practice. The library is also there, with a lot of books for reference. The hostel is good, and security is also there for the girls' hostel. The boys' hostel is far away from the girls' hostel. A canteen is also there for meals.

reviews.review_heading: College has value for money with good infrastructure and quality education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our college are very good. College has its own lab on the campus itself. We have a canteen in our college where one will get decent quality food. Classrooms are also well-equipped. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls at a very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, friendly students, and a big campus
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department and campus for students are good. I don't know about hostel facilities and services. There are different department of different course. I don't know about hostel menu and meal facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Deogiri college review.
reviews.review_text: I am not from the hostel, so I don't know about the hostel facilities, but the department's infrastructure is good. There are computer labs, and the Wi-Fi is also reliable. The classrooms are spacious, but I personally don't like the canteen much, as there is a lack of hygiene in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The latest overall college review.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the college and the campus is very good. There is greenery and cleanliness has been maintained in all areas. All the classroom libraries, like the computer library, are well developed, as are the medical facilities, sports and games, and canteens. All the facilities are up-to-date.

reviews.review_heading: Good College for student who are interested in doing BBA course.
reviews.review_text: Deogiri College is one of the best colleges in terms of infrastructure in Aurangabad city. All the classrooms are digital with projectors fitted, and labs are also available. The college campus has Wi-Fi facilities for both staff and students. The library is good, with the availability of all essential books.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel for engineering boys was separate. The hostel has a total of 4 floors. Every floor is separate for every year of students. There are about 16 rooms on each floor. Every student gets separate cupboards. Tables and chairs were provided. The meal quality was good. The unlimited meal was provided in the mess of the hostel. Hostel registration is an online process. One can apply to a hostel through the college's website. There are many other rooms available in the college area for students...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good campus and teachers, but not good curriculum.
reviews.review_text: There are good classrooms in the campus which are kept neat and clean. Also, there are smart classrooms for the students. The Library is very impressive having a lot of books which you can read after the classes. The hostel is average and the food is also average for the students who live in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: My educational experience at Deogiri College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with proper facilities like washrooms, ladies' rooms, labs, libraries, spacious classrooms, and a staff room. Medical and food facilities are okay, but the canteen is good. The sports ground is very large, and various games and sports activities take place every month.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, 2020 batch.
reviews.review_text: Colleges have combined campuses. For all Deogiri colleges, we have combined sports grounds, mostly dominated by engineering students. We do not have Wi-Fi jammers placed everywhere in college. Even you cannot call someone. But in the computer lab, we all have internet access. The hostel is beside the college building, and the food is awesome. At breakfast, they give eggs and fruits, and at dinner and lunch, it is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Deogiri College M.Sc.  IT.
reviews.review_text: In our combined campus for Engineering and Management students, our ground is very small, and there is no Wi-Fi available in college. Our classroom benches and boards have become old and need to be replaced. We have hostels provided by the college where for breakfast, we get a meal with eggs, fruits, and a special dish made on Sundays.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Deogiri College

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra and Accenture are visiting our campus.
The maximum number of students get placed in our course, and I get my offers in the course.

overview_faqs.question: Is BBA available at NIMR Mumbai?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, National Institute of Management and Research Studies offers three-year BBA programme spread across six semesters. The institute offers BBA in Aviation Management and Logistics & Supply Chain Management. Aspirants must complete Class 12 to apply for any of the BBA specialisations. The selection for BBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

admission_overview.description: NIMR Mumbai admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institute accepts national-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. NIMR Mumbai offers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels in Management, Science and other streams. Besides, the institute also offers courses in distance education mode. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website for their preferred programme.

paragraphs: Candidates must apply for the course of their choice as a first step. The institute selects candidates for admission based on their merit in the entrance exam or qualifying exam. Below is the step-wise NIMR Mumbai admission process:
STEP 1: NIMR Mumbai Application Process 2025
Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the official website of the institute. Aspirants first need to choose a course and then fill the form.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the registration is over, the institute evaluates the applications of the candidates. Admission to all courses except MBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The institute considers the Management entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates are informed about their admission. They need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

NIMR offers courses at multiple levels. The fee that candidates need to pay varies course-wise. Candidates need to pay tuition fees every year to continue their courses. Below is the course-wiseNIMR Mumbai fee:

placement_report.college_name: National Institute of Management and Research Studies Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: National Institute of Management and Research Studies Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to unofficial sources, the highest and average package offered during National Institute of Management and Research Studies placements 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of National Institute of Management and Research Studies in recent past included leading companies such as Reckitt Benckiser , Viacom 18 , Ogilvy and Boston Consultancy Group.

faqs.question: Does National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) have good placements?
faqs.answer: It is true that the National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) offers quality job placements. High-end recruiters highly value the well-rounded professionals that NIMR produces and its solid reputation for delivering high-quality education. To give students plenty of options for internships and full-time jobs, the institute maintains a specialised placement cell that collaborates closely with top businesses in a range of industries. NIMR has a 90% placement rate for its graduating batches, according to the institute's official website. Numerous alumni of the school have secured positions at reputable corporations, including IBM, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL. In startups and entrepreneurial endeavors, some students have also been placed.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBA students at NIMR, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The highest package for MBA students at NIMR, Mumbai was just Rs 5,85,000. the highest placement was offered by cognizant to 12 students. The placement scenerio is not good in college, it has been decreased from previous years. Some of the top recruiters at NIMR Mumbai include Ogilvy, BCG, Viacom 18, Tata Consultancy Services, Deloitte, and Ernst & Young.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at NIMR, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: According to unofficial sources, the highest and average package offered during National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) placements in 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. However, it’s essential to verify this information directly with the institute for the most accurate and up-to-date details. The average package of NIMR is not yet disclosed for this year. But looking at the market and the course the package that the students are getting is not that good. Having a 6LPA package with an MBA degree is not satisfying. Placements are not so good at NIMR, Mumbai. The latest details are often provided by the college through official reports, placement brochures, or direct communication with the placement cell.

college_info.college_name: Oriental University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for Oriental University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Oriental University's popular programmes are MBA, BTech, and BSc. The university offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Oriental University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Finance, HR, IT, Marketing, Data Analytics, and others. The below-mentioned are Oriental University's popular programmes:
For more information about Oriental University check out the below video:

faqs.question: Which companies are the top recruiters at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    The median package offered to the students pursuing BTech at Oriental University fluctuates every year. Based on the latest NIRF Report 2024 for Engineering at the university, the median pacakge offered across various BTech streams was INR 3.2 LPA in 2023. In 2022, the median package offered during BTech placements at the university was INR 3 LPA. The median package offered to BTech students in 2024 will be released with the release of NIRF report 2025.

faqs.question: Where are Oriental University alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. faqs.question: What is the course fee for four years B.Tech at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Oriental University is both entrance-based and merit-based. For undergraduate technical courses, admission is through the 12th percentage and national level test JEE. However, for other courses, admission is granted based on the 12th standard marks itself.So, while some courses may require an entrance exam, others may not. It’s recommended to check the specific admission criteria for the course you’re interested in on the official Oriental University website or admission portalThe basic eligibility for students seeking admission to the B.Tech course includes passing the 10+2 exam with Physics, Maths, and Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology/Vocational Sciences as main subjects through a recognised board or university with a minimum of 45% marks.I hope this information helps! If you have any other questions, feel free to ask.
faqs.question: Can students join Oriental University directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from 2nd April 2026 to 9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.
faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?

Admissions at Oriental University are based on national-level entrance examinations. Therefore, in addition to meeting the basic eligibility criteria, candidates have to appear for either CAT or MAT examination to be considered for the admission process.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

review_content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Oriental University is the best.

review_content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. review_summary.college_name: Oriental University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 72 LPA, the lowest is 2.0 LPA, and the average is 25 LPA in my course. Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas and Co and Trilegal are the top recruiting companies. The percentage of students placed is 70 to 77 percent in the above-named companies and in Luthra and Luthra Law Offices, Indus Law, P&A Law Offices, etc. Roles offered are Advocates, advisory, legal firm, corporate lawyers, in-house counsel, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory here for everyone, and a gym facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.

content.Placements: The college placement drive is impressive, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package offered is 72 LPA. Top recruiters like TCS, Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro, and HCL provided diverse and rewarding opportunities, reflecting strong industry connections.
content.Infrastructure: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is the best.

content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.

content.Placements: Hello, I’m Asutosh Pastor. I enrolled in Oriental University Indore in September 2024 for B.Tech. In my class, there are 60 students. My fee is 70,000, and the actual fee is 75,000. Since I got 70% in Class 12, I received a discount. However, I asked for more discounts because I belong to the EWS category, but they did not provide any discounts for EWS. They only provide discounts for OBC and SC categories. The college and hostel are decent. .
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

admission_overview.title: Oriental University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Oriental University admission is offered on both academic merit and entrance test scores depending on the programme. The university provides courses at UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Agriculture, Engineering, Science, Commerce, Computer Applications, and more. Interested students can register themselves on the Oriental University admission portal at admission.oui.edu.in. The mode of application available is both online and offline. Students who wish to apply offline, have to visit the Oriental University, Indore campus along with relevant documents. The complete admission process is based on the respective entrance examination. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for Oriental Univeristy.

The university shorlists students based on respective national-level entrance examinations or academic merit in the qualifying exam. The accepted tests include JEE/ CUET/ CLAT/ CAT/ UCEED, and more. However, merit is also considered selective programmes, such as BA, BPharma, BSc, etc. The university offers its courses through various departments. These focus in the key area of specialisations, such as Engineering, Law, Pharmacy, and more. It is important that the applicants fulfil the eligibility and selection requirements to get admission. Students need to submit valid entrance scores or provide scores in the last qualifying exam to be eligible. The university conducts a common admission process for all of its courses. Find below the steps to complete theOriental University admission process:
Oriental University Indore Application Process 2026

Visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired programme by filling the application form. The Common Application Form may be collected physically from the admission office of the university. Students have to submit the form with documents & application fees.
Oriental University Selection Process 2026

Students are shortlisted based on their performance in the accepted entrance exam or score secured by them in the last qualifying exam. Students also have to appear for counselling rounds to get selected. The rounds are divided into different phases. It is also applicable to get the scholarships.
Oriental University Admission Confirmation 2026
Students can pay theOriental University admission feesand go through verification of documents for seat confirmation.

placement_data.title: Oriental University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released a few placement statistics for the 2025 drive as the drive is still ongoing. As of now, 886 placements have been grabbed by the 2025 batch. Of all the participating companies, TCS offered the highest number of placements.

Earlier, over 1,157 placements were made to the 2024 passing-out batch and Cognizant emerged as the top recruiter with the highest number of placements offered (186). In addition to this, the University has a legacy of 100% placement assistance. The highest package offered during Oriental University placements 2024 was INR 72 LPA . Furthermore, the average package stood at INR 5.30 LPA . The list of recruiters who participated in recent drives included TCS, Alembic, Hyundai , and many others.

highlights.description: Oriental University is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #68 by the India Today 2025 under the category University (Private). The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Oriental University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2023

reviews.review_heading: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.
reviews.review_text: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory...

reviews.review_heading: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.
reviews.review_text: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is the best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in this range. If you have no other choices, you can apply to this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure and facilities are good.  
Wi-Fi is available but on the first floor.  
Canteen is all okay.  
Library is all good. I like it.  
Classrooms are spacious.  
And just labs are also okay.  
Sports may happen sometimes or not.  
Medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and the environment of college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms are available. Food available in canteen is good, but the food in the mess is average. Environment is library is quite peaceful, we can study there without any disturbance and Wi-Fi is also available. Every floor has a lift and labs are available for practical .

reviews.review_heading: The college and the facilities or infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi surveillance is available, and the smart classroom and the central library are located, and many other classes. The quality of food is average in the mess. There are four-time meals in the mess. A canteen is also located.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Oriental University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is really vast, with labs for practical knowledge. The university also provides hostel facilities for students from different cities. The hostel provides mess facilities as well as Wi-Fi. Regional festivals of students from different states are also celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Why Oriental University Indore is good for you!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good; allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Why choose Oriental University, Indore?
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, spacious, and overall a good environment. Classrooms are good, and the library is good. Every book related to the course is available. Only the library has that there is no Wi-Fi all over campus. Food in the canteen is excellent. Sports facilities are less regular, not sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Oriental University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is good and management of the university is good canteens are well arranged and good food is provided. Furthermore, hostels are well-designed and maintained, and the meals are tasty. Many courses are available at our university with nice arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: The dream university: Oriental.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good, allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great college value for money good at .
reviews.review_text: Excellent library, big classrooms with projector, advanced labs with wi-fi facilities are available. Well qualified faculty members are also there. Teaching method of faculty members is also very good. Hostel provides all necessary facilities like wi-fi,  24*7 water combined bathrooms with rooms, indoor badminton court, cctv, nice balcony with room of three types-  single, double and triple seater. Mess is also very good, it provides healthy and hygienic food at proper time. Mess is very clean. ...

reviews.review_heading: My college provides all activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries, which are well organized, and their labs are digital. In the hostel, all facilities are good, like mess food, which is hygienic, and medical facilities are good, and sports and games are good.

data.description: Oriental University has eminent faculty members who have years of experience in the related field. The academic staff members are experienced and knowledgeable. They are passionate and committed to helping the students and aim to give deeper assistance and purpose to give the core values. According, to Shiksha verified user faculty has 3.6 rating out of 5.

paragraphs: Yes, BTech aspirants at Oriental University can avail a fee rebate under OU-Aspire scholarship provided by the university. The merit-based scholarships at Oriental University are awared to the BTech students based on their merit in JEE Main or HSC. Based on the information available on the university's official website, an applicant with a JEE (Main) rank under 5 Lacs is eligible for a fee rebate under Criteria 1 of OU-Aspire scholarship. If the candidate is pursuing BTech in a stream other than CSE, their annual fee will be reduced from INR 40,000 to INR 32,500. For students pursuing BTech in CSE, the fee amount will be reduced from INR 75,000 to INR 60,000. The mentioned information is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

highlights.summary: KIIT School of Design admissions 2025 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro:
KIIT School of Design's popular programme is BDes. The institute offers BDes courses across various specialisations such as Automotive & Transportation Design, Graphics, and Product are among the very rarely offered courses. The college aims to create opportunities in Exterior Design, Interior Design, and Color and Trim Design. Graphic Design students are taught the art and practice of projecting and planning ideas and several experiences with the help of visual and textual content.
KIIT School of Design students are taught skills and the art required to become good Designers. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the KIIT School of Design and their respective eligibility and KIIT School of Design fee structure:

placements.overview: KIIT School of Design under the Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. Among the various scholarships, KIIT provides the KIIT Poverty-Cum-Merit Scholarship to poor and needy students. The period and amount of scholarships are decided based on the needs of the selected candidate. The below-mentioned are scholarships offered by KIIT:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: KIIT School of Design offers UG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Design stream. At the UG level, the college offers BDes courses to students. BDes is provided with three specialisations Automotive and Transportation Design, Graphic Design, and Product Design. Below mentioned are some of the KIIT School of Design courses and their respective eligibility and KIIT School of Design fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must complete Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate to apply for KIIT School of Design BDes programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must also pass KIITEE for admission to BDes course.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BDes at KIIT School of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    KIIT School of Design is quite affordable college offering quality education to students. The total tuition fee for the BDes course is INR 14 lakh. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as transportation charges, and others. For students finding KIIT School of Design costly, there are various scholarships provided by the college.
faqs.question: How costly is KIIT School of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    There is no application fee to register for KIITEE. Aspirants can fill out the form on the school's website or download the same for submission. Besides, candidates also need to upload the below documents to submit the form:PhotographSignatureClass 10 and Class 12 marksheet

faqs.answer: Yes, KIIT School of Design considers KIITEE scores conducted by KIIT Bhubaneshwar. Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Entrance Examination is conducted online at national-level. The test is conducted three-times in a year for two-hours in English language. Once selected based on entrance exam scores, aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

paragraphs: KIIT School of Design admissionsare entrance-based. The school considers scores inKIITEEconducted byKIIT Bhubaneshwar. The school offers a four-year full-time BDes programme at the UG level.KIIT School of Designoffers AICTE-approved and UGC-recognised courses. Interested candidates can apply online for admissions.

Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate
Download:KIITEE Brochure 2025
KIIT School of Design Brochure
KSOD offers a full-time BDes programme for four years. Currently, the admissions are open for BDes. Candidates can check the steps below to get a seat in KSOD:
Step 1: KIIT School of Design Application Process 2025

Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred course. Candidates can also download the form from the KSOD's website. The application process comprises registration, filling form and uploading the required documents.
Step 2: Selection
The selection for BDes admission is based on KIITEE scores. Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology Entrance Examination is conducted in online mode at the national level.
Step 3: Counselling

Once the results are out, candidates need to participate in counselling and the seat allotment process. Shortlisted aspirants also need to report at the campus for document verification and payment of theKSOD fee.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. B.Ed. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The campus has beautiful surroundings, perfect for learning.

review_content.Placements: In my course, around 60 students are enrolled in the B.Sc. B.Ed. program. We are not offered salary packages. Our internship, which lasts for two months. It is conducted by the department itself. However, we do not get paid during it. All students get internships, but there is no job guarantee.
review_content.Infrastructure: We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. They are not very updated as per current demands. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor hygiene in food and water facilities. No canteen is present on the hostel campus, and the hostel building is weak.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Study with nature in a calm place like Dr. Harisingh Gour University.

review_content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students get placed in the judiciary, corporate, and Litigation. The university is very well known for its law course because of its placement and environment. The highest package it got is 39 LPA in the corporate sector for one of our alumni. Thus, it is a very well known university for its placement in the judiciary. We have our alumni in various high courts of India, as well as in the Supreme Court of India.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have different classrooms for each B.A. LL.B. LL.B. L.M. course. There is also a separate library in our department only for law students, where you can find any books of your subject from 1st sem to 10th sem, plus there are also journals. There is also a moot court hall in our department.

A registration fee of 1,000 is levied against students who take part in the university's placement initiatives, including as employment training, internship offers, and campus drives.

review_summary.college_name: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is value for money and easy-going.

content.Placements: Officially, there are 0 percent placements from the college side. Few students do get placed through their own ability and off-campus efforts, and that percentage is also very low. Hence, we have to be self-dependent here in this region, although management might make certain efforts.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, the university offers MHRD Wi-Fi (which often creates some hurdles), but it is a decent one to go with. There is a separate computer lab as well. We have a law library there with comfortable seats, a peaceful environment, and books on almost every relevant subject.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: No placements but qualified teachers and good hands-on practice to get placed.

content.Placements: If I talk about placements, there are no placements as such in this field. You have to be perfect in terms of lab work and equipment to get project work in labs, like ICMR, DRDO, etc. Most students pursue Ph.D. after M.Sc. If I talk about roles, you will be a biotechnologist and can discover drugs, vaccines, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Recently, in 2025, the Biotechnology department is assigned a new building with the best laboratory facilities, Wi-Fi, smart class, and a personal library for the department. If I talk about the hostel, it is quite old, but almost all sorts of facilities are available, like geysers, medical doctors, etc. There is a basketball court and volleyball court also, and students play cricket quite often on weekends.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The campus has beautiful surroundings, perfect for learning.

content.Placements: In my course, around 60 students are enrolled in the B.Sc. B.Ed. program. We are not offered salary packages. Our internship, which lasts for two months. It is conducted by the department itself. However, we do not get paid during it. All students get internships, but there is no job guarantee.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. They are not very updated as per current demands. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor hygiene in food and water facilities. No canteen is present on the hostel campus, and the hostel building is weak.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Study with nature in a calm place like Dr. Harisingh Gour University.

content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students get placed in the judiciary, corporate, and Litigation. The university is very well known for its law course because of its placement and environment. The highest package it got is 39 LPA in the corporate sector for one of our alumni. Thus, it is a very well known university for its placement in the judiciary. We have our alumni in various high courts of India, as well as in the Supreme Court of India.
content.Infrastructure: We have different classrooms for each B.A. LL.B. LL.B. L.M. course. There is also a separate library in our department only for law students, where you can find any books of your subject from 1st sem to 10th sem, plus there are also journals. There is also a moot court hall in our department.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, good faculty members with good teaching experience.

content.Placements: Placement rate is not so high, but still better than that of other colleges. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is around 4 LPA. Good internship rate, tie up with major companies like Google Cloud and Amazon for the internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, proper labs are there, and proper classes. Food is average, but the overall facilities are good.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very good, they're highly qualified, have great knowledge, and are always ready to help. The course curriculum is relevant, proper knowledge of subjects is provided, and the teaching is good enough to make students ready for the industry. Exams are not so difficult, it's easy if you attend regular classes and just revise your lessons properly. The passing rate is very high. Teachers give the best Knowledge.

admission_overview.college_name: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Dr Harisingh Gour University formerly known as Sagar University offers degree, diploma, and certificate programs to aspirants at the undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and doctorate (PhD) level. Programmes offered at Dr Harisingh Gour University are in streams including Science, Arts (Fine/ Visual/Performing), Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Engineering, Humanities & Social Sciences, and Law.

Candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for Dr Harisingh Gour University admissions to various UG & PG courses, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Dr Harisingh Gour University course admissions 2025:

Dr Harisingh Gour University fees may include various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The below table mentions the Dr Harisingh Gour University fees for various UG & PG courses:
Dr Harisingh Gour University offers PG courses via its campus and various affiliated colleges. Find below the seat bifurcation for various courses offered at Dr Harishsingh Gour University:

Dr Harisingh Gour University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around Harishsingh Gour University admissions 2025:
Step 1: Dr Harisingh Gour University Application Process 2025

Dr Harisingh Gour University's admission process for 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Dr Harisingh Gour University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Dr Harisingh Gour University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as CUET for the selection of respective courses. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_report.college_name: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the NIRF report 2024 released by Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, the median package offered during UG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.53 LPA . Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.11 LPA and INR 9.42 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, nine BSc Forensic students and six MBA students have been placed during Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya placements 2023 . The placement season is still on and the complete statistics are not available on the official website. Till now, a total of 192 students have registered and 121 students participated during the placement drive 2023.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya placements 2023?
faqs.answer: Numerous companies have taken part in Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya placements. Across multiple disciplines, more than 150 companies took part in campus placement drives at Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya. Wipro, Cognizant, Infosys, Tata Consultancy Services, and others were major recruiters. The average salary package was between 4.5 and 5 LPA, while the highest salary package offered in placements was 16 LPA. Employers such as Microsoft, Samsung R&D, Amazon, and others have held recruitment drives here in recent years. Software development, core engineering, IT/software services, financial services, analytics, and more are important fields where students have been placed. After the placement season ends, the placement numbers are typically updated.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Pharm from Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: After completing a BPharm degree from Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, graduates can pursue various government job related to Pharmaceutical field. Some of these include: Drug Inspector : You can appear for state or central government exams to become a Drug Inspector. Pharmacist : Positions in government hospitals, clinics, and healthcare centers. Lecturer : Teaching positions in government colleges after clearing NET or similar exams. Research Officer : Jobs in government research institutions like CSIR or ICMR.

highlights.description: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #17 by the Outlook 2025 under the Central Universities category. It ranked #274 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
As per the overall score, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya has been placed at a good position by the Outlook under the 'Central Universities' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Central Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya's rank is #17, the same as last year's rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

qs_world.description:
Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya fell 150 ranks to #851 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya fell 52 ranks to #274 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. Value for money in law.
