Our Moot Court Hall and Law Library building are good, but there is no water cooler in the Law Library and Moot Court Hall. We have a Wi-Fi connection in the department as well as in the library. We have 6 to 7 classrooms and one computer lab, but it’s not in operation. We have a good hostel, but there is water scarcity, and the cleanliness in the was...

reviews.review_heading: Average, but go for it. It will be worth it.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided in the college labs, library, clean washrooms, everything. If we talk about the hostel, every necessary thing is provided, from hygiene and food to silence. Only girls stay in a single hostel, which is safe, and everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with low budget fees.
reviews.review_text: Personal library in my department. There is a sports stadium at some distance from my college for the development of the physical skills of the students. There is no mess in hostel, you have to order lunch service outside the hostel. There is a small medical hospital of the college, which is only for college students.

reviews.review_heading: Pocket friendly is the easiest way to pursue anything.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have air conditioning and comfortable furniture for sitting. There are water coolers over there, and we have lifts in our building that are open for students. Classrooms of BBA are worse in comparison to MBA classes. Talking about hostels, they have been renovated recently and offer enough facilities to the students. There is a university stadium that offers different types of sporting opportunities for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Budget friendly college with good studies.
reviews.review_text: In my course, there is very good facility. We have a personal library in my department. There is no mess facility in hostel. You can hire a lunch service in the hostel. There is medical hospital of college which is for only college students. There are sports activities organised in my college for the development of the students.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a good environment with a good city and knowledge, then you should come here.
reviews.review_text: In the case of infrastructure, it is well developed, and Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Labs are good, and the library is famous in India. It is one of the biggest libraries in India. There is a hospital for students for minor health problems, which is also near the sports area. There is a whole stadium for students, and different sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, good study. They give you a good life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are good, and a personal library is situated in my college. Also, I can pursue lunch service in the hostel. There is a medical hospital of the college, which is only for college students. They are organizing sports activities for the development of the students.

reviews.review_heading: A good college in your budget.
reviews.review_text: In my course, there is a very good faculty and a personal library situated in my department. Also, labs and big classrooms with projectors are very helpful for studying. There is no mess facility in the hostel; you can pursue lunch service in the hostel. There is a medical hospital of the college, which is for only college students. There are sports games organized in which, if you are selected, you can go from the regional to the national level of the game.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available are very poor for students in the geology department, which is a very old building, but it's the best department in the university. That's why the maximum number of students take geology. The hostel is good but not the best in food and security.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: As a Central University, the fees are significantly lower than private institutions, making education accessible to a wider range of students. The sprawling 1312.89-acre campus boasts good infrastructure, including a Central Library (one of the largest in Madhya Pradesh), departmental libraries, computer labs, and smart labs. The hostel facility is also good, with an affordable mess service.

placements.overview: In Nagindas Khandwala College, 1456 students admitted in year 2016-17, out of which 1061 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 57 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.261259 and 196 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2017-18, 1507 students were admitted, out of which 1239 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 64 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.220681 and 220 students got selected for higher studies. In Nagindas Khandwala College, 1682 students admitted in year 2018-19, out of which 1431 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 51 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.218000 and 138 students got selected for higher studies.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nagindas Khandwala College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies and Science. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Nagindas Khandwala College offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Com.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (B.M.S.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placement at my college is average some students get good placements while others do not. If you work hard during your college days you can maximize your package to 5 to 6 lakhs. Otherwise you might only get 1 lakh placement and even then it is not guaranteed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Media and Communication (BAMMC) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.

review_content.Placements: 60-90% of students got placed. It is average and I don't know much about media, journalism, advertisement, PR, digital content, and startups. 60-70% of students get internships in second year only, some do freelancing, etc. Roles offered are content, writers, social media manager, video creator, journalism, and graphic designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

review_summary.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the teaching but not with the placement.

content.Placements: At least 10 per cent of students were placed in my batch, and they also sent non-IT roles to the placement cell group. The package is up to 3.5 to 5 LPA, and they also send companies like Media.Net, Bigul, and customer support roles in the IT placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The library is good, but no Wi-Fi is provided. I also found a couple in the library, which is disturbing. They should remove them from the library. The quality of food is good in the canteen, and the college also supports sports, in which I have taken part. Medical support is also provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great teaching technique.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Morgan Stanley, Amazon, a hospital, etc. 90 percent of students got internships. Roles offered are counselling psychologists and many others. One of my classmates got the top placement in the criminal psychology field. I believe it is important to know all the placements they provide in college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are mid-level not so good, at the same time not so bad. The hostels are not that great. The infrastructure is mid-level. I hope you visit once before going to the toilets, which are quite broken and dirty at times, the authorities don't take action at all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (B.M.S.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement at my college is average some students get good placements while others do not. If you work hard during your college days you can maximize your package to 5 to 6 lakhs. Otherwise you might only get 1 lakh placement and even then it is not guaranteed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Media and Communication (BAMMC) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.

content.Placements: 60-90% of students got placed. It is average and I don't know much about media, journalism, advertisement, PR, digital content, and startups. 60-70% of students get internships in second year only, some do freelancing, etc. Roles offered are content, writers, social media manager, video creator, journalism, and graphic designer.
content.Infrastructure: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons.) in Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for management studies.

content.Placements: I am not very aware of placements as I am still in the 3rd year of this course, but after completing the 2nd year, there are many internship opportunities, which is the best part. There are internships from different companies, including VML, Vijay Sales, and Paytm.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very good and air-conditioned. There is also a good canteen facility. There is a gymkhana to play games and a library to study and be stress-free. They also take care of cleanliness across the whole campus, and there is an elevator facility for all students.

admission_overview.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Nagindas Khandwala College admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. The institute accepts scores in MAH CET, Maharashtra HSC, and Mumbai University Admission. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of Nagindas Khandwala College. The college offers programmes in Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Banking and Finance and Insurance streams.
The college offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at the PG level, the duration is 2 years.

The total fee ofNagindas Khandwala Collegeincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching but not with the placement.
reviews.review_text: The library is good, but no Wi-Fi is provided. I also found a couple in the library, which is disturbing. They should remove them from the library. The quality of food is good in the canteen, and the college also supports sports, in which I have taken part. Medical support is also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Great teaching technique.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are mid-level not so good, at the same time not so bad. The hostels are not that great. The infrastructure is mid-level. I hope you visit once before going to the toilets, which are quite broken and dirty at times, the authorities don't take action at all.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

reviews.review_heading: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.
reviews.review_text: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for management studies.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good and air-conditioned. There is also a good canteen facility. There is a gymkhana to play games and a library to study and be stress-free. They also take care of cleanliness across the whole campus, and there is an elevator facility for all students.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good infrastructure and decent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms and modern computer lab. There is a spacious library with a wide range of books. We have high-speed internet across the campus. There are also well-maintained sports facilities. We don't have any hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The development of Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text: All classes have AC and work amazingly. We have a library which is accessible throughout the year. The canteen is great, and sports opportunities are also great. We have different sports and sports teams in our college. Wi-Fi is sadly not for students, but labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing experience to attend college at Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text: The college is fully air-conditioned with a great and affordable canteen, excellent IT labs and library with all the facilities. The beautiful infrastructure surrounded by trees and plants makes it perfect. The college is well known for its large events and seminars held on campus which attract everyone.

reviews.review_heading: The Nagindas Khandwala BAF.
reviews.review_text: Nice teacher, good education. Classes and the interior of rooms could be improved. The classrooms are very shabby and not maintained. The labs are good, and the computers are nice. We don’t have Wi-Fi accessible to students. The canteen is okay, not too good, not too bad. We have game rooms too, which have chess and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in 2024 but not very great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and a computer lab in the college. The library has everything that a student needs to study and also a separate computer lab. The canteen is not up to the mark, and the gymkhana is also fine, which has games like chess, table tennis, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: An awesome college to join with many fests.
reviews.review_text: All places like classrooms, a library, a sports place, a seminar hall, and conference rooms are very clean. They are enabled with high-speed internet. The quality of all these facilities is up to the mark. Our college has a canteen. It provides food at affordable rates. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and curriculum, vibrant campus life; needs more industry exposure and advanced tools.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well equipped computer labs with updated software reliable WiFi spacious classrooms and a comprehensive library for the B.Sc Computer Science course. Hostel facilities are comfortable with basic amenities although the food quality in the mess and canteen could improve. Medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies and there are ample space for sports and games, encouraging physical fitness and recreation for students.

The classrooms are big and spacious enough to accommodate 100 to 120 students. 
There are 4 computer labs. 
A variety of food is available in vegetarian and jain options. 
There is a gymkhana also made available to the students.

paragraphs: The admission forIIFA Lancaster Institute of Designstarts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then go through other selection rounds, such as application, selection rounds, and admission confirmation. Students have to complete all the steps to get admission. Interested students can see below the steps forIIFA Lancaster Institute of Design admission process:
Application Process 2026

Students can go to the official site of IIFA Lancaster Institute of Design to apply online. Applicants need to submit the documents and pay the application fees. The application form has to be submitted before the last date of admission.
Selection Process 2026

Students at IIFA Lancaster Institute of Design are offered direct admissions. Students are selected on the basis of academic merit + creative aptitude and interest in design. The selection round may also include application submission, portfolio review, and personal interview.
Admission Confirmation
Selected students have to report for verification of documents. To complete the process, students need to pay theIIFA Lancaster Institute of Design fees.

review_summary.college_name: Monark University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA Hons. - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Monark University is really good, and its canteen provides the best food.

content.Placements: There is a 95% pass rate from the course. The college includes top recruiters like Tata, Toyota, Axis Bank, etc. The top roles offered in my course are HR, management, finance, data analytics, marketing, and digital marketing. It also focuses on English communication.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average but flexible. The department is very supportive; all the faculty and staff are very good. The quality of the hostel is average, but the food they provide is really like home. There have been no issues regarding health or safety concerns.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Go for it guys. Really the best.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Students getting placed were 70%. The highest package was 10 LPA+, the lowest was 3 LPA. There are various top recruiters. 35% of students got internships. Managerial roles were the mostly provided roles by the college, course, and recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The college is best in looks, gives you full Bollywood vibes, and the college is surrounded by greenery. Everything is just perfect. The college even had its own ambulance services, and many more things were there in the college and on its campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies for our courses are Zydus, Apollo, and many more known companies. Top roles offered in our courses were a medical representative, pharmacist, medical business, medicine developer, medical researchers and many more like this.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.

content.Placements: In my course, there are minimal students who get placement from colleges, and they also don't provide any internships from their side; we have to search for companies for an internship. Many of us did paid internships instead of internships with Stifund.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our course infrastructure is worth the money.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities provided at our university are 100%. Internships are provided by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Classrooms are big and 25 to 30 personal computers are available in every lab. Library consists of books for every course. Canteen serves good food. Our campus is big. There is a separate building for every course.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are well-graduated. Teaching quality is great. They arrange extra classes for students who joined late. Exams are easy if students study. The pass percentage is based on exams. Experts are invited from the industry to make students industry ready.

faqs.question: Is CUET cumpulsory for MBA admission at Monark University?
faqs.answer: CUET Common University Entrance Test is not needed for MBA at Monark University. Entrance tests scores, including CAT, MAT, or GMAT, can also be considered for MBA courses. Even direct admissions in management quota or merit quota are possible. It would be advisable to log on to the website of the university or directly approach the Admission Office for exact details on entrance tests and other qualifying criteria.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Monark University?
faqs.answer: The answer is that the direct admissions at Monark University are offered for certain programs like B.Tech., directly through merit or in the management quota. For such criteria, the candidate must have a good academic record and a good score in relevant entrance exams. For such criteria and procedures for direct admission, reach the Admission office of the University or look for it at their official website.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Monark University for admission MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates must havepassed 10+2 or equivalent from a recognized board in India. Monark University accepts results from the CAT, MAT, and JEMAT entrance exams for MBA admissions. Candidates' results on the university's entrance exam may also be used to determine their eligibility.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Monark University?
faqs.answer: Yes, is it easy to get admission in Monark University. The university accepts admission based on merit. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. Monark University course admission begins with the online application. Interested candidates can apply directly through the official website.

placement_report.college_name: Monark University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Monark University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Monark University has released the highest package offered during the recent placement drive. According to the latest report, the highest package offered during the recent Monark University placements stood at INR 30 LPA, and the highest stipend offered was INR 40,000 per month. Some of the top recruiters of Monark University include Adani Group, Airtel, TCS, IBM, Voltas, Wipro, etc.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing MBA from Monark University?
faqs.answer: Once an MBA is obtained from Monark University, then, after this two-year graduation program, graduates can check into the host of various roles across finance, marketing, human resource, operations, and consulting sectors. Some common roles include a Marketing Manager, Financial Analyst, Human Resources Manager, Operations Manager, or a Business Consultant. Apart from this, some may even begin their own business or work as leaders in startups. An employment placement cell is there in the university to connect students with recruiters and also build as many opportunities as possible with private as well as government sectors. Employment opportunity increased through networking and internship.

reviews.review_heading: Monark University is really good, and its canteen provides the best food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but flexible. The department is very supportive; all the faculty and staff are very good. The quality of the hostel is average, but the food they provide is really like home. There have been no issues regarding health or safety concerns.

reviews.review_heading: Go for it guys. Really the best.
reviews.review_text: The college is best in looks, gives you full Bollywood vibes, and the college is surrounded by greenery. Everything is just perfect. The college even had its own ambulance services, and many more things were there in the college and on its campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.
reviews.review_text: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.
reviews.review_text: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

reviews.review_heading: Our course infrastructure is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Classrooms are big and 25 to 30 personal computers are available in every lab. Library consists of books for every course. Canteen serves good food. Our campus is big. There is a separate building for every course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Monark University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average with very limited amenities. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Food served in the canteen is costly and the taste is average.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus, supportive faculty, & great opportunities. The university provided scholarships.
reviews.review_text: Very nice college. The open garden and environment were very good. I pursued a B.E. in Mechanical Engineering at Monark University, and the experience was great. The campus was modern with well-equipped labs and a central library. On-campus hostel facilities were clean and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college to study BCA.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was not provided sometimes in our classrooms. Lights were not properly provided. The lab was not good and updated as they used the old version of computers. Classrooms were not good but the library was good. Hostel rooms were old and the canteen was not available. The quality of street food was low but the price was high. Sports were good.

data.description: Monark University has a sprawling campus equipped with state-of-the-art facilities with all the amenities offered at the campus. Monark University claims to have well-equipped laboratories catering to various disciplines like science, technology, commerce, and languages. The university has well-equipped classrooms, library, auditorium, conference hall, sports complex, and others. There's a dedicated transport facility with buses covering major routes in Ahmedabad.

individual_reviews.course: PGDM in E-Business - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: True colour of Welingkar.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed. The highest package is 24 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA. Recruiting companies are EY, Deloitte, KPMG, and BNY. 49% of students get internships till now in ICICI Bank, BNY, BigBasket, Redbull, etc. Analyst, HR roles, marketing roles, and operations roles are also offered. Our college has an umbrella placement system, and have to cope up with every company that comes in.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is small and no play area or sports area in this college. Classrooms are good and spacious. AC is also available. Hostel is great and flats are provided with 2&3 bhk with all furniture. There are no AC, geyser, iron board, beds, sofa, tv, dining table, fridge, microwave oven, or cloth dryer.

content.Infrastructure: I think the building is very small. college should be bigger and it does not have a ground. There should be at least one ground. admission_overview.college_name: Welingkar Bangalore Course Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Application Process, Last Date

paragraphs: Welingkar Bangalore Admission 2025 is open for the full-time Postgraduate Diploma in Management (PGDM). Admission to Welingkar Bangalore's full-time PGDM programme is based on national-level entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, GMAT, etc. Further, candidates are shortlisted based on their profile and percentile in the entrance exams. Welingkar Bangalore offers a vast range of PGDM and executive MDP courses to students in the field of Management. PGDM is the flagship programme ofWelingkar Institute of Management Development and Research (WeSchool), Bangalore. Check out the table below for admission highlights of Welingkar Bangalore:
Particulars
Welingkar Bangalore Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-Time/ Part-Time
Programmes Offered
5+ courses across multiple specialisations
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to the flagship course is based on a valid score obtained by the candidates in national-level entrance exams along with other selection rounds. Admission to all the courses offered Welingkar Bangalore is subject to merit in the entrance exam, selection rounds, and past academics. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for all WE School programmes:
Bachelor's degree with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised University
Academic Perfromamce + Work Expirence + Group Activity + PI +
CAT/XAT/GMATPercentile

The admission process for Welingkar Bangalore is done in two phases, i.e., phase 1 and phase 2. Phase 1 includes Profile Calls, which are not relevant in Phase 2. Therefore, aspirants with a strong academic profile (60% or above) should consider this an advantage for cracking a GDPI Call. These candidates can be CAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, or GMAT takers. Any pending scores can be updated later. The Welingkar Bangalore admission process is a multi-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification. A step-by-step process that students need to follow is as follows:
STEP 1: Welingkar Bangalore Application Process 2025

The application process for all programmes at Welingkar Bangalore is done online. Candidates can fill out the Welingkar Bangalore application form 2025 on the official website for the respective course accepting exam as given above. The registration fee for all programmes varies as per the counselling bodies & official website of Welingkar Bangalore for short-term courses. The application process includes multiple steps.
Step 2: Welingkar Bangalore Selection Process 2025

Candidates are shortlisted based on their profile and percentile in the entrance exams. Shortlisted candidates are further required to appear for the group and personal interviews as per the respective course.
Step 3: Merit list
Welingkar Bangalore makes admission offers to applicants who make the merit list after calculating total composite score merit for each applicant based on all selection criteria.
Step 4: Welingkar Bangalore Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates who are shortlisted based on merit lists must submit the specified admission fee for their respective courses. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theWelingkar Bangalore feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

Prin. L N Welingkar Institute of Management Development and Research MBA cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to its MBA/PGDM course. The Institute does not release the final CAT cutoff publicly and is only accessible through account login to those candidates who appear in the CAT exam. Hence, the available cutoff table below is based on previous years’ trends and the actual cutoffs might vary.

highlights.description: Welingkar Bangalore has been ranked by various renowned ranking bodies such as NIRF, Business Today, and many others. The ranking bodies mentioned above validate the Welingkar Bangalore on various parameters such as quality of education, research work, placement, etc. According to the said parameters, these ranking bodies have given the institute high ranks and scores. Candidates can refer to the details tabulated below for more information regarding the Welingkar Bangalore rankings:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among Business Today Ranked Colleges In Bangalore In 2024

nirf.description: Welingkar Bangalore is consistently recognised as a reputed institution in various categories by NIRF 2023. Under the criteria such as Quality Learning and Employability Weightage, the college holds a commendable position when considered against other universities. Students can check the table below for the Welingkar Bangalore NIRF rankings:

reviews.review_heading: True colour of Welingkar.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is small and no play area or sports area in this college. Classrooms are good and spacious. AC is also available. Hostel is great and flats are provided with 2&3 bhk with all furniture. There are no AC, geyser, iron board, beds, sofa, tv, dining table, fridge, microwave oven, or cloth dryer.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good placements, faculty, and infrastructure , but fees are dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: I think the building is very small. college should be bigger and it does not have a ground. There should be at least one ground. But, Wi-Fi, library, and classroom facilities are very good. Talking about the hostel, I don't like the canteen food, but aside from the food, everything else is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned and have Wi-Fi. There are also a library and a lab for business design domain students with a dedicated coach. It also has lots of activities and campaigns which encourage lots of creative and innovative solutions to challenge real-world problems.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with decent placements. Students are given an insight of industry via industrial visits
reviews.review_text: Library and classrooms are good, Wi-Fi is also provided, some indoor games are also present, canteen facility is there. The hostel is a service apartment and all the amenities are present, including gym, sports, canteen, cleanliness is taken care.

reviews.review_heading: Ample opportunities for placements. Good industry exposure
reviews.review_text: You will get all the required amenities here. Food is far better compared to college canteen. Daily cleaning is done by the stanza staff. You will get a card in which you will get a balance of 2750 at the starting of each month. Breakfast is provided every morning by hostel. You will have to get used to idlis and dosa.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placement scenario.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in college available are Wi-Fi, IT labs, Air Conditioned Classrooms, Library, Auditorium, lack of proper medical facilities and sports ground Facilities in hostel includes Wi-Fi. Quality of food is not good, no proper medical facilities, badminton court is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college faculty.
reviews.review_text: We have bloomberg terminal, Well stocked library, modern infrastructure and a good canteen facility. The hostel is really good with all basic amenities like TV, laundry, play area, a good canteen, house keeping 24*7 We have place to play badminton, foosball, also have gym facilities, dance classes etc.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied with the placements and happy with the knowledge I had gained from my faculties.
reviews.review_text:
1. Wi-Fi, behavioural lab, computer lab, library etc. 
2. The quality of food is good along with good medical facilities. The canteen keeps all kind of food from drinks, wafers to eggs. The food is available for both vegetarians as well as non-vegetarians. The food is cooked separately for vegetarians and non vegetarians.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in terms of teaching and placements are good as well.
reviews.review_text:
1. The infrastructure is good though the area is small, All classes are having centralized AC's. IT lab, prototype lab is present in call, college has an inhouse canteen facility a small backyard as well. 
2. The hostel is a service apartment so all the facilities like Gym, carrom, chess, snooker, T. T, Badminton are available along with one cafeteria and one mess.

reviews.review_heading: Its a place filled with opportunities and competition but make sure you grab the right one!
reviews.review_text:
The infra of the college is very good and equipped with state of art tech.
Hostel is a service apartment and takes care of all the needs.
The food has been proved since stanza has taken over. 
Though the timings are quite restricted but still its a good place to stay and almost all the students stay here so its better for getting work done.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty, but placements should be improved.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities. It has brainstorming rooms, a library, and a creative lab for a prototype in case we have an idea. We even have Bloomberg subscription, and the best part is we have subscribed magazines. Hostel facilities are good here, and all other facilities are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the course, but everything should be student-driven.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good labs, library and mainly access to different kinds of magazines subscription. They also have Bloomberg access for data. There is also a creativity lab for the creation of prototypes to our ideas. The hostel facility is good, and as it is a third-party service, their maintenance is very good. Food quality can be improved. For sports, it has its own limitations, like only indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in our college are best and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered by Welingkar include 24x7 Wi-Fi facility, breakfast and dinner, library, computers, cleaning facility. Twin sharing hostel is available about 3 km away from the college. There is a bus facility for pick and drop from college to hostel and vice versa for convenience.

reviews.review_heading: I am really happy to be a part of WeSchool.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are very good. Breakfast and lunch are provided here. We have good washrooms and good water facility for drinking. The infrastructure of the college is also very pleasant. We have big enough classrooms. The entire campus is centralised air-conditioned. Separate library and board room are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good decent college level.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure facilities are good. Library with a wide variety of books are available. Wi-Fi is not provided though. Classrooms with projectors, AC and reading rooms are also provided. In hostel Wi-Fi, washing and iroing clothes, room cleaning service, TV, are provided. Food is not that good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Prin. L N Welingkar Institute of Management Development and Research

likes.text: Various recruiters which offered internships were Big Basket, Siemens, McEnroe, HDFC, Spar, Treebo Hotels, Future General and many more.
Recruiters offered roles such as sales manager, business analysts, data analyst, and market researcher, etc.

likes.text: The canteen in the college is good and has breakfast, lunch and snacking options available.
AC classrooms, WiFi connections, A/V systems, IT labs, library and canteen facilities are all good.

likes.text: WeSchool also boasts of a great team of visiting faculty members who are industry experts and are more than glad to share their knowledge with the young minds.
Talking about curriculum weschool keeps in mind what is the next and current trend in the industry and arranges lectures accordingly.

paragraphs: The details regarding Welingkar Bangalore course fees are mentioned below:
Tuition fees and other: INR 7,00,000/- p.a which is subject to change
Hostel fees: INR 1,25,400/- p.a. Plus a deposit of INR 10,000/- (refundable)
Library deposit: INR 4,000/- (refundable)

WeSchool specializes in PGDM courses which are similar to MBA courses, except the fact that PGDM courses provide more practical exposure. The tuition fees for these courses is about Rs. 7 LPA. Hostel accommodation is compulsory for Bengaluru Campus with the hostel fees being Rs. 1,25,400 p.a. along with refundable deposits of Rs. 14,000.

Yes, Welingkar Bangalore offers scholarships to deserving students. The institute offers Dr G SunJewels Scholarship for PGDM Business Design students and Dr. Rinti Banerjee Scholarship for PGDM Healthcare Management. Students can check the points below for more clarity:

Dr G SunJewels Scholarship for PGDM Business Design student: Dr. G. SunJewels Scholarship: The scholarship is to encourage high potential students from underprivileged families or single parent families, who are not able to pay the required tuition fees of PGDM Programme. The selected student will also need to fulfil the continuous assessment measures of WeSchool. This initiative covers one full-tuition fee scholarship for choosing to pursue PGDM Business Design.

Dr. Rinti Banerjee Scholarship for PGDM Healthcare Management:  Dr Rinti Banerjee scholarship in Healthcare: This scholarship covers 50% of the fee for one female student of the PGDM Healthcare student with an MBBS background. The scholarship was started in 2022 to encourage female MBBS students to pursue Management education in healthcare.

faqs.answer: A:    NIFD Global Bangalore BBA admission is open for the session 2025-26. Admission to BBA is merit-based. To get admission to BBA, applicants must pass Class 12 from a recognised. Additionally, candidates required to fill out the application form online by visiting the college website to be eligible for admission.
faqs.question: Can I join BBA directly at NIFD Global Bangalore?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no management quota available at NIFD Global Bangalore. The college offers direct admission, based on the last qualifying score. There is no other way to get a seat at NIFD Global Bangalore.The institute offers limited seats to all the courses available, on a first come first serve basis. To grab the seat candidates need to do all the fulfillment fastly to grab the seat.

review_content.Placements: I passed out just a month back or two. In my course when IAS studying there were hardly 5 of us. The lowest can be 5-10k for internship, if paid for job average can range from 10-15 and the highest can be 20-25 with good knowledge. Top recruiting companies are mostly from livespace, asian paints, homelane, etc. About 80% of students are already doing their internship and the rest are being interviewed. The companies most of them are hired for is mostly live space some of whom are also working at Asian paints. Top roles offered are of an interior designer, visual merchandiser, store planner, colour consultant, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advance Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because I got a good knowledge of fashion industry even in the diploma course.

review_content.Placements: Tommy Hilfiger and Reliance Trends were the top for recruiting companies. At least 10% of the total students got placed. Creativity and group assignments were the main roles offered in the course of advance diploma in fashion designing. It was a good college to be hired by good companies after finishing the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good and attractive, but the total area was very less. Wi-Fi was available for some subjects only. Classrooms have adopted a digital system for educating students in a proper manner. Sewing machines were also placed for every student.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is perfect, and just what they promise in starting they don't deliver at the end.

review_content.Placements: College doesn't provide any placements. When we asked for it, they said search by yourself. But while taking admissions, they promised that they are going to give us placements. Interior designer post role was offered. Before our batch, 1-2 students got internships that's it, and from our batch, no one got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members and infrastructure was nice. But the Institute was little small, and not worth the money we paid. College didn't have its hostel, and they recommended us nearby PG and hostels. Classrooms were okay, but they never gave us Wi-Fi code, but while taking admission they said it is a Wi-Fi free campus.

review_summary.college_name: NIFD Global Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty, and a very professional environment. Well maintained and engaging study.

content.Placements: I passed out just a month back or two. In my course when IAS studying there were hardly 5 of us. The lowest can be 5-10k for internship, if paid for job average can range from 10-15 and the highest can be 20-25 with good knowledge. Top recruiting companies are mostly from livespace, asian paints, homelane, etc. About 80% of students are already doing their internship and the rest are being interviewed. The companies most of them are hired for is mostly live space some of whom are also working at Asian paints. Top roles offered are of an interior designer, visual merchandiser, store planner, colour consultant, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Advance Diploma in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because I got a good knowledge of fashion industry even in the diploma course.

content.Placements: Tommy Hilfiger and Reliance Trends were the top for recruiting companies. At least 10% of the total students got placed. Creativity and group assignments were the main roles offered in the course of advance diploma in fashion designing. It was a good college to be hired by good companies after finishing the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good and attractive, but the total area was very less. Wi-Fi was available for some subjects only. Classrooms have adopted a digital system for educating students in a proper manner. Sewing machines were also placed for every student.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Everything is perfect, and just what they promise in starting they don't deliver at the end.

content.Placements: College doesn't provide any placements. When we asked for it, they said search by yourself. But while taking admissions, they promised that they are going to give us placements. Interior designer post role was offered. Before our batch, 1-2 students got internships that's it, and from our batch, no one got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members and infrastructure was nice. But the Institute was little small, and not worth the money we paid. College didn't have its hostel, and they recommended us nearby PG and hostels. Classrooms were okay, but they never gave us Wi-Fi code, but while taking admission they said it is a Wi-Fi free campus.

admission_overview.college_name: NIFD Global Bangalore Courses Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: NIFD Global Bangalore admission is purely merit-based for all the courses. To be eligible for admission, applicants must have a minimum qualification of Class 10 and Class 12.NIFD Global Bangaloreprovides a variety of design courses, including BVoc, MVoc, BDes, MDes, and MSc. Additionally, it offers short-term design courses lasting from six months to three years. Applicants willing to apply forNIFD Global Bangalore admission 2025must apply online by visiting the college's official website for admission. Read the below article to know more about NIFD Global Bangalore admission, along with course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

NIFD Global Bangalore admission 2025 is live on the college's official website. The college offers courses under three schools, such as School of Design, School of Beauty and Management. The courses offered by the college include BVoc, BBA, BDes and others. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. Interested applicants can check out the updated information about NIFD Global Bangalore course admission 2025 courses along with eligibility and selection criteria in the following table:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreNIFD Global Bangalore courses
NIFD Global Bangalore admissions 2025 is merit-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around Global Bangalore admissions 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility are required to visit the official website of the institute to fill out the application form online. Candidates need to select the desired course, fill in all the specified details, pay the application fee and upload the required documents to complete the registration.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the courses at NIFD Global Bangalore is entirely merit-based. Candidates seeking admission must meet the minimum eligibility criteria. To be admitted to UG courses, candidates must pass Class 12 from a recognised board and have a graduation degree for admission to PG courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
The candidates are required to payNIFD Global Bangalore course feewithin the given deadline to grab the final seat. The institute offers limited seats available, on a first come first serve basis.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sadanlal Sanwaldas Khanna Girls’ Degree College.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The average salary offered was Rs. 80,000 per month. Our students get a chance to ace their knowledge in the field of physics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Our classrooms are properly ventilated. Practical laboratories are well-furnished. Wi-Fi facility is not available. The infrastructure is better.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is up to the mark. Our teachers are down to earth, and they always help us with our queries. Our course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are moderate. The pass percentage is 33%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I like the college. There are rare placement chances.

review_content.Placements: There are rare placement chances. I don't know about packages. Visiting companies in our college is comparatively very less. 1 or 2% students only would have been got placements approximately. In my course, we can be offered many roles in computer Science fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi connection usually be very low and laboratories are not in very good condition like how they should be. There is no hostel in our college and quality of our canteen is also not good. Medical facility is better, and sports and games are also played by the students.

While performing arts provide options in acting, dancing, directing, and producing, visual arts and design offer pathways like graphic design, illustration, and art direction. Digital marketing experts, social media managers, and content producers are common positions in the field of digital media and communication.Options for authorship, content development, and journalism are presented by writing and journalism. review_summary.college_name: S.S.Khanna Girls' Degree College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in English language - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very okayish college, no campus life, will only recommend if you want to do a Ph.D. later.

content.Placements: No students are getting placed after graduation, it's only for a degree if you are from the arts stream. Maybe in other courses there are placements, but not in B.A., so other courses can offer you a placement, but not in an undergraduate art degree. My friend from B.Com has done some job, but it was not a very nice job, but it is okay work from home, things suitable for timepass. You can't run home from that job.
content.Infrastructure: There is one canteen and infrastructure. Rooms are okay, not so fancy but not so unique, it is a decent experience for me. I'd suggest you go there if you don't want a grand college life, it is okayish. Everything is very basic and easy to get.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LLB. (Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college story of Law Life, which has struggle but a strong overcome.

content.Placements: The course overall offers a wide range of knowledge as well as experience but the placement procedure is still not in active mode. Soon, the procedure of placement will also start at the college. We are all looking forward to that ad. We are too excited for it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure I will say that it's not that appropriate because the population and courses in college require more space, a bigger campus, and a good building. The infrastructure is also very much required, as it's needed to raise student numbers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sadanlal Sanwaldas Khanna Girls’ Degree College.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The average salary offered was Rs. 80,000 per month. Our students get a chance to ace their knowledge in the field of physics.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Our classrooms are properly ventilated. Practical laboratories are well-furnished. Wi-Fi facility is not available. The infrastructure is better.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is up to the mark. Our teachers are down to earth, and they always help us with our queries. Our course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are moderate. The pass percentage is 33%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I like the college. There are rare placement chances.

content.Placements: There are rare placement chances. I don't know about packages. Visiting companies in our college is comparatively very less. 1 or 2% students only would have been got placements approximately. In my course, we can be offered many roles in computer Science fields.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi connection usually be very low and laboratories are not in very good condition like how they should be. There is no hostel in our college and quality of our canteen is also not good. Medical facility is better, and sports and games are also played by the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and clean surroundings.

content.Placements: Internships are very good in collaboration with MEDHA it helps us in placement too. A good environment is provided to get an internship. Different types of curriculum activities are held in our college to help us to explore and learn new things.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, clean surroundings and good environment for students with facilities like canteen, clinic, sports activities, and library. Games take place. College gives many facilities both incase of games and education which are good and satisfying.

Interested students can get theSadanlal Sanwaldas Khanna Girls' Degree Collegeapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science and Teaching and Education, and more. To know about the eligibility of Sadanlal Sanwaldas Khanna Girls' Degree College courses, students can visit the website.

Sadanlal Sanwaldas Khanna Girls' Degree College fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

college_info.intro: Sigma University Vadodara provides courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BCA etc. through 10+ faculties. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to proceed with the admission process. The University offers courses such as BTech, MBA and BSc as the popular course in full-time mode. review_summary.college_name: Sigma University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: Placements and job opportunities are very good in the engineering line. And in our college placements and job opportunities are very good. So many companies are coming to our college for placements like Larson and Tubro, Rhine Engineering Pvt Ltd. They also get a stipend of Rs. 15,000. Also, good training in various branches of our technical field. It is overall average.
content.Infrastructure: Information Technology and Mathematical Innovation is a professional program that has a duration of 4 years and has 8 semesters in total. The course includes experiments, hands-on projects, innovative projects, model implementation, and much more. The days are full of learning and exams are a little tiring. I stay near to my college, I didn't go to PG hostels, but the review was good. Also, recommend others for the same. The fee is also affordable for any type of PG student from another city or any other country.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sigma University.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students got placements last year from my course. The highest package offered was 6.5 LPA. The lowest was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, Uno Mind, L&T, UPL, Inox, and Godrej. Recently 60% of students got internships in our city in Vary company.
content.Infrastructure: There are three buildings. One for degree students, one for diploma, and one for pharmacy. All buildings are good. Good creativity on the walls has been shown. Wi-Fi is there. Labs are there for each subject. The Outdoor is too good. In the front, we have a main auditorium, where we play cricket most of the time. Behind the campus, there is one big football ground. So many facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you want the college days you dream then no need to come.

content.Placements: None of the companies are well known and it's unclear who comes to pick us up from campus. The packages offered are not competitive. The highest package would be the lowest of some other college so choose wisely. You can pursue an internship here but it's not a place to get your dream job you have to find some way.
content.Infrastructure: The college lacks Wi-Fi, and there is no air conditioning. It doesn’t have a canteen like some other colleges. The canteen is rented out. Labs are acceptable, but you won’t have many opportunities to use them, as access is mostly limited to exams. Classroom facilities are okay, but there could be improvements.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Social Work ( BSW) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review on sigma university .

content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students from our social work program have been placed. There are various NGOs where we are placed. The highest package is 5-6 lakhs per annum. The average package was around 3-4 lakhs and the lowest amount was 2-3 lakhs. Top roles offered to social work students include counselor case manager community developer researcher and program manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our social work department has modern classrooms seminar rooms and an auditorium. We have access to a library. The department has a computer lab which provides opportunities for research and paperwork. The hostel facilities are satisfactory. Our hostel has clean rooms bathrooms a common room and sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied of management and classroom and washrooms.

content.Infrastructure: The college does not have Wi-Fi facilities, except for one network that provides only 30 MB, which is not enough. Labs are average, and some are still under maintenance. Classrooms are okay or below average because some do not have properly working fans and are hot. The library is very good and silent, and it provides every book used in engineering. I don't have any experience with the hostel, but my friend lives there and says it is not a good place to stay, is very dirty, and lacks cleanliness. The food provided in the canteen is below average. The medical facilities available are basic, like tables and spray. Sports and games are not held at the hostel.

paragraphs: Sigma University admissionsis based on merit/entrance exam/counselling/in-house entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates can apply online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Sigma University is as per the steps below:
1: Sigma University Application Process

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website for all courses, i.e., https://admissions23.sigmauniversity.ac.in/. The application fee for PhD course is INR 1,500. The payment should be made online by credit card/debit card/net banking. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
2: Selection

The university admits students based on GUJCET followed by ACPC Counselling, Merit, Entrance Exam + Viva as per respective courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theSigma University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff get a seat. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Selected aspirants need to come for document verification. Aspirants need to pay theSigma University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

Further updates are down below:

During the Sigma University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 22015 and 39821 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same

On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of a

For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 14506 to 50639. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by . These

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: Information Technology and Mathematical Innovation is a professional program that has a duration of 4 years and has 8 semesters in total. The course includes experiments, hands-on projects, innovative projects, model implementation, and much more. The days are full of learning and exams are a little tiring. I stay near to my college, I didn't go to PG hostels, but the review was good. Also, recommend others for the same. The fee is also affordable for any type of PG student from another city or ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: There are three buildings. One for degree students, one for diploma, and one for pharmacy. All buildings are good. Good creativity on the walls has been shown. Wi-Fi is there. Labs are there for each subject. The Outdoor is too good. In the front, we have a main auditorium, where we play cricket most of the time. Behind the campus, there is one big football ground. So many facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: If you want the college days you dream then no need to come.
reviews.review_text: The college lacks Wi-Fi, and there is no air conditioning. It doesn’t have a canteen like some other colleges. The canteen is rented out. Labs are acceptable, but you won’t have many opportunities to use them, as access is mostly limited to exams. Classroom facilities are okay, but there could be improvements.

reviews.review_heading: Review on sigma university .
reviews.review_text: Our social work department has modern classrooms seminar rooms and an auditorium. We have access to a library. The department has a computer lab which provides opportunities for research and paperwork. The hostel facilities are satisfactory. Our hostel has clean rooms bathrooms a common room and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied of management and classroom and washrooms.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have Wi-Fi facilities, except for one network that provides only 30 MB, which is not enough. Labs are average, and some are still under maintenance. Classrooms are okay or below average because some do not have properly working fans and are hot. The library is very good and silent, and it provides every book used in engineering. I don't have any experience with the hostel, but my friend lives there and says it is not a good place to stay, is very dirty, and lacks cleanliness...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's good if you have to study and extra curriculum activities.
reviews.review_text: Me and my friends are not in the hostel, so we don’t know much about it, but it’s far away from college, like 2-3 km, and I don’t think they provide a mess or canteen in the hostel. Their hostel is like a guest house, not too many facilities, and the same goes for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in IT from the Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a decent infrastructure for the IT course. All the necessary facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi, sports, etc., were available for the students. The campus of the college was big and had ample parking space. Students were also getting hostel facilities at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and best experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the labs and classrooms is top-notch, allowing us to focus on our studies. Free Wi-Fi is also available. Hostel facilities are also available in the college. Separate hostels for boys and girls are provided. The food quality is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: The management department's infrastructure is exceptional. In fact, all the departments have good infrastructure. The classrooms are CCTV equipped. There are different libraries in the respective departments. A swimming pool and gym are available for fitness freaks.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, a smart library, and an advanced computer lab were available in our college. Our department was good. Our college had a good atmosphere, a sports area, and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for learning skills.
reviews.review_text: The campus is furnished with amenities including a canteen, library, lodging, labs, etc. The only place with Wi-Fi is the seminar room. Although the hostel has room for 170 students, rooms are assigned based on merit and a personal interview. It has a supervised fitness center for employees and students. Treadmills, workout benches, and other tools for lifting weights are included. The canteen at the college is spacious. 200 students can be accommodated at once. It attempts to offer wholesome me...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge lab in our college. It has many classrooms and many auditoriums. It provides a hostel facility for both girls and boys. There are many canteens on our campus. The food served in the hostel is best. There is high security in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college because of its good placements.
reviews.review_text: College and hostel both place are Wi-Fi is enabled, but short-range. The food served is medium test and quality to provide. Hostel is good, and I have enjoyed it. Security is available in both place and active all camera and security, which is completely secure and safe.

reviews.review_heading: This is a great place to recieve knowledge. It provides supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It has different buildings for students of different streams. It has all the necessary amenities like well-equipped laboratories and classrooms. There is audiovisual aid in the classroom which helps in better learning. The library is filled with a variety of books required.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the campus includes all the amenities like labs, audio visual rooms and common rooms like auditorium. There are also a large variety of equipment to study and gain practical knowledge. Also many services like audio visual room for Learning.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sigma University

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Nirmala College of Arts and Science Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nirmala College of Arts and Science offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, Nirmala College of Arts and Science offers courses such as M.Com and MHMTT. Nirmala College of Arts and Science fee structure for all the courses is around INR 3,150 to 1,44,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Nirmala College of Arts and Science offers various courses like B.Com, B.A, BBA, BCA, B.Sc, BHMTT in Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Hospitality & Travel, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design, Science, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Mass Communication & Media stream. Nirmala College of Arts and Science has specializations such as English, Travel & Tourism Management, Fashion Design, Computer Science.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Personally, my college life experience was lower than expected.

review_content.Placements: I was a BCA student, and my class had around 40 students. Around 10 students were only placed; the maximum package the companies offered was 18k per month, and the minimum package was 8k per month. The top recruiting company was Nokia; around 20% of students got internships from our course in some startup companies. The major roles offered by our course were marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: BCA offers computer labs, which are obviously needed. The classroom is big and clean with two fans, and the computer lab consists of AC. A library is provided, but we won't get to go there much. The canteen and cafeteria are really good; they provide good food at an affordable price.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good college in the outskirts of Chalakudy, Thrissur.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is 80%. The lowest package is INR 3 LPA. The highest is around INR 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, Vendorin, and Appzen. Overall, the placement cell at NCAS is said to be really good and the alumni review is also the same. Also, they offer abroad programs right after the second year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are available. Classrooms are good. Internet facilities are only available in labs. The hostel I got is good but there's no Wi-Fi facility available. We got a good room, basically like a small house and the food is also good. The canteen food is also great.
