In addition to this, it has been rated 3.86 on Campus Life, 3.72 on Placements, 3.86 on Faculty and 3.61 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Nirmala College of Arts and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Multimedia - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall nice and best college.

content.Placements: 30% of students got placements after their graduation. There are many packages; 800 is the longest and 2000 is the highest. There are many big companies for recruitment, 85%, companies like Aerons. They give any roles in companies according to our skills and experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our college. They provide library, lab, Wi-Fi, etc. Also, our classrooms have projectors for high-tech studies. There are 75+ computers and Wi-Fi in our department computer lab. They also update books every 2 months. I'm not in hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Food Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nirmala College of Arts and Science is a dream college .

content.Placements: Food technology is a course of analysis of the major technologies in food. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA, and the highest is 12 LPA. Nestle, Cadbury, Amul, Milma, chocolate companies, and food processing companies are packing quality assurance. Qc, food safety controller lab assistant.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, library, ground, turf, exception area, presentation hall, stages. Hostel life is the best. The food is very good, compared to other hostels. Games are available, like badminton caroms. Nearby clinics and hospitals are available. message is very clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Personally, my college life experience was lower than expected.

content.Placements: I was a BCA student, and my class had around 40 students. Around 10 students were only placed; the maximum package the companies offered was 18k per month, and the minimum package was 8k per month. The top recruiting company was Nokia; around 20% of students got internships from our course in some startup companies. The major roles offered by our course were marketing.
content.Infrastructure: BCA offers computer labs, which are obviously needed. The classroom is big and clean with two fans, and the computer lab consists of AC. A library is provided, but we won't get to go there much. The canteen and cafeteria are really good; they provide good food at an affordable price.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college in the outskirts of Chalakudy, Thrissur.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is 80%. The lowest package is INR 3 LPA. The highest is around INR 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, Vendorin, and Appzen. Overall, the placement cell at NCAS is said to be really good and the alumni review is also the same. Also, they offer abroad programs right after the second year.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are available. Classrooms are good. Internet facilities are only available in labs. The hostel I got is good but there's no Wi-Fi facility available. We got a good room, basically like a small house and the food is also good. The canteen food is also great.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the overall management and administration of the college.

content.Placements: Bachelor of Business Administration is one of the best courses at this college. It offers better job opportunities. They provide campus placements every year. Representatives come from popular companies and offer us jobs. It is very helpful.
content.Infrastructure: The college management helps in finding the best hostel facilities for students who come from far away. The food and everything else provided there is pretty average. Since the distance from the hostel to the college is less and there is a transport facility arranged from the college, this is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall nice and best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. They provide library, lab, Wi-Fi, etc. Also, our classrooms have projectors for high-tech studies. There are 75+ computers and Wi-Fi in our department computer lab. They also update books every 2 months. I'm not in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Nirmala College of Arts and Science is a dream college .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, library, ground, turf, exception area, presentation hall, stages. Hostel life is the best. The food is very good, compared to other hostels. Games are available, like badminton caroms. Nearby clinics and hospitals are available. message is very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Personally, my college life experience was lower than expected.
reviews.review_text: BCA offers computer labs, which are obviously needed. The classroom is big and clean with two fans, and the computer lab consists of AC. A library is provided, but we won't get to go there much. The canteen and cafeteria are really good; they provide good food at an affordable price.

reviews.review_heading: A good college in the outskirts of Chalakudy, Thrissur.
reviews.review_text:
Labs are available.
Classrooms are good.
Internet facilities are only available in labs.
The hostel I got is good but there's no Wi-Fi facility available. We got a good room, basically like a small house and the food is also good.
The canteen food is also great.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the overall management and administration of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college management helps in finding the best hostel facilities for students who come from far away. The food and everything else provided there is pretty average. Since the distance from the hostel to the college is less and there is a transport facility arranged from the college, this is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not completed in our college. Always they doing construction work in between classes. Also there is no facilities of certain department activities. There is no facilities to dispose sanitary napkins. All other are good. Canteen, lab, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to mould your future. Excellent infrastructure and faculties they will guide you.
reviews.review_text: College provides excellent infrastructure such as Wi-Fi campus, Computer labs, Classroom projector, library, Canteen etc. The food served is of delicious and top quality. A very friendly and cool environment for the students. The college encourages in sports and arts.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers were very friendly to students, and we can ask any doubt
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of B.A. English course are very good. The classes are held very easily. Library was also cool. Classrooms are very clean and seating are very cool. There are two hostels for college, one was in Chalakudy another one in Koratty.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college gives Wi-Fi to all students for a better learning. There are well maintained labs and the library provides a great collections of books. The hostel fees is charged highly and the facilities are very bad. It provides good quality of food in the canteen. There is a lack of medical facilities and chances of sports and games are very bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nirmala College of Arts and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is grand in the main block of the college but not good where the classes are taken. The main auditorium is nothing but 2 or 3 classes joined together. The hostel is not worth it at all. The food provided is not worth anything, and sometimes even stomachaches happen to our friends.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and memorable campus life.
reviews.review_text: There was no college-provided hostel. The infrastructure of the college was overall good. When we were studying the canteen building was not yet finished construction. For engineering, arts, and diplomas there was a single common canteen. So the rush most of the time was so rough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nirmala College of Arts and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Hostel facility was good, and the surroundings were also good, and it was affordable. It also provides a Wi-Fi facility. Students feel more comfortable studying. The fee structure was not much, when compared to other colleges, and it was reasonable. A lot of companies visit there for recruitment.  It provides high-tech classrooms and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is perfect, and there are so many.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is perfect, and the classes are smart and fully air-conditioned. There are canteens, dining areas, and full facilities. The staff encourages sports, and medical staff for students. Labs are structured with new equipment. There are many books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Nirmala college of arts and Science is a very good scenery Rich place which we can enjoy .
reviews.review_text: Good in sports and arts activities. Our college provides good support towards arts and sports activities and is one of the best college in Chalakudy. College has a good team for football and cricket which had got many trophies for many tournaments .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty, good placements, and campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college plays a vital role in students' lives. The infrastructure of our college is well arranged. It provides many sports corners. Classrooms are also very nice. Labs, hostel, and canteen are very attractive to the students.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is good for engineering.

review_content.Placements: I am Yash Chandra, studying in SSTC, doing B.Tech in CSE (AIML). I chose this subject because of AI development in the future. The average package was 4 LPA in several companies like Amazon, Microsoft, etc., which is good. You can choose this college for a better future with government jobs if you top this university.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, cleanliness of rooms, the mess food is okay, and the hostel is also good. There are also medical facilities available in our hostel as well as in college, and indoor game equipment is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .

review_content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year of college Our seniors get placed this year Basically the percentage of placement in our college is about 60% because most of the students go for GATE exam &startups. The placements are quite normal with a basic package it depends on your skills that how much you are getting paid. The highest package is something around 10 LPA and the lowest is not fixed but a roughly figure is 3LPA. Companies that visit in IT and CS branches for the placement are TCS mostly and sometimes there is google and other multinational companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is quite basic, classroom are average and library is very nice with Wi-Fi facility. Our technical labs are good and have nice internet connection. Overall our infrastructure is quite good and advance. Medical and sports facilities are quite good in our college because our college has ha medical branch also near our campus. Hostal food is good in boys hostal but basic in girls hostel I will prefer for tiffin service for a better health. Our canteen is good for having snacks and lunch good environment and pockets friendly.

Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Animation, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Engineering. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus as a good Institute?

review_summary.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA+ MCA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.

content.Placements: Minimum and average students are placed in my course. Students who pursue different subjects like bio, commerce, and arts are also placed in the same way. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruitment is there in Reliance, Nilon, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is decent, with supportive faculty and departments. It is value for money.

content.Placements: There are placements, but they are not up to the mark when compared to the total number of students graduated. Faculty members promise 100 percent placement when you take admission into this college, but providing placement to even 200 graduates out of 1000 cannot be called 100% placement.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent. There is a separate hostel for freshers and another for seniors, so there is no ragging in this college. You share a room with 2-3 people in the first year, and from the second year, 2 people occupy one room. However, most students shift outside the campus to PGs, flats, etc., after the first year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for engineering.

content.Placements: I am Yash Chandra, studying in SSTC, doing B.Tech in CSE (AIML). I chose this subject because of AI development in the future. The average package was 4 LPA in several companies like Amazon, Microsoft, etc., which is good. You can choose this college for a better future with government jobs if you top this university.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, cleanliness of rooms, the mess food is okay, and the hostel is also good. There are also medical facilities available in our hostel as well as in college, and indoor game equipment is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .

content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year of college Our seniors get placed this year Basically the percentage of placement in our college is about 60% because most of the students go for GATE exam &startups. The placements are quite normal with a basic package it depends on your skills that how much you are getting paid. The highest package is something around 10 LPA and the lowest is not fixed but a roughly figure is 3LPA. Companies that visit in IT and CS branches for the placement are TCS mostly and sometimes there is google and other multinational companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is quite basic, classroom are average and library is very nice with Wi-Fi facility. Our technical labs are good and have nice internet connection. Overall our infrastructure is quite good and advance. Medical and sports facilities are quite good in our college because our college has ha medical branch also near our campus. Hostal food is good in boys hostal but basic in girls hostel I will prefer for tiffin service for a better health. Our canteen is good for having snacks and lunch good environment and pockets friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I will not recommend this college as it is now overcrowded for B.Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Nearly 10-20% students are placed through campus drives. Salary packages range from 2 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiter is 3M. Around 50% of students get internships in pharma companies for roles such as sales, production, QA, and research. It has scope for more companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, but mostly simple seating, like benches/desks. It also equipped with blackboards/whiteboards, sometimes a projector. Basic ventilation and fans, and AC are limited to seminar halls only. There are different labs for different subjects. There is one life really sufficient for B.Pharmacy. Students have no access to Wi-Fi. I haven't lived in hostel but I have listened to different students who say that hostel food is the worst. There is no specific sports and games period, we only get to play when there is a festival or different pharmacy days.

description: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 164055 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus MBBS cutoff 2025 was 164055 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 549227 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 2631, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 3569 during Round 2 admission.

This year, in 2025, the cutoff rank for admission to MBBS was 2506 for the General AI category students._x000D_ On the other hand, for the OBC category candidates, the Round 2 cutoff rank for the same course stood at 2255, suggesting that the competition for the General AI category is lower as compared to the OBC category. To view the cutoff details category-wise and round-wise for 2025, 2024, and 2023, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .

Students have no access to Wi-Fi. I haven't lived in hostel but I have listened to different students who say that hostel food is the worst. There is no specific sports and games period, ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is perfect for good placements and other cultures.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course and the department include free Wi-Fi in all corridors, clean and perfect labs with all types of instruments and glassware, spacious classrooms for lectures and other tests, and a library for reading and books.

reviews.review_heading: It's an amazing experience at this college, as well as the faculty and other activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by our college for the B. Pharmacy course is quite satisfactory support for academic and practical learning. The classrooms are spacious. Well, it has equipment with projectors for digital teaching. Laboratories are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: In short my college is quite average with very good placements and average facilities, satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite average. Not that much good. Wi-Fi is slow. Labs are good. Classrooms in my opinion are not that good. Library is also average. Hostel facility is average and their mess is okay. College canteen is quite good. Also, the campus has extra fast food and juice shops, includes stationery. Sports teams also have been in competition with other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: I'm somewhat dissatisfied because of mediocre teachers, with a low-quality hostel and mess.
reviews.review_text: There are not so good facilities and infrastructure available in this college. There is Wi-Fi on campus, which is decent. The labs have equipment, but some of them don't work. Some computers don't have operating systems, while others may lack keyboard or mouse. Classrooms have dirty benches. The library is decent and has ample books relevant to the course. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is terrible, and it smells a lot in the corridors. The food quality of mess is barely edible, but...

reviews.review_heading: Decent faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, including hostels and laboratories. SSTC provides well-equipped labs for various departments and classrooms are very great. College has a huge library which has massive books collections. They have great hostel and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dents to come to the college .
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and big enough to accommodate all the students. Wi-Fi is available in the college and the library is good, clean and has Wi-Fi. The classrooms are good and are cleaned every day. There are labs for chemistry, physics and computers as well as a workshop.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but not that good because of faculty members and there are no good placements.
reviews.review_text:
1. There is a big library where all the subject books are, and students can read there.
2. In the hostel, there are 2-, 3-, and 4-seater rooms where students can take rooms of their choice. The quality of food is not that of food in the mess and the mess is also not that hygienic. Plates are not washed properly. Food is provided for 3 durations: one is in the morning, that is breakfast, the second is lunch, and the third is dinner at night. No milk is given to any student.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for having a good college life that gives you a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The administration building is not so good, and the hostel is not that great. The classroom blocks are average. Overall, the college is not bad, but it could be better. Tthe rooms don't have air conditioning, which makes it difficult to attend classes in the summer, especially in the hot weather of Bhilai.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average at best the facilities it provides can be better.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in infrastructure of the college is very good and can accommodate very large amount of students but the infrastructure is old and is not much maintained. Labs and classrooms are good and can accommodate up to 50 students 
The quality of hostel is not that good considered that the infrastructure is old it needs to be cleaned and maintained canteen is a mess the food quality is very poor and sports and games are not that much played.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college but could be better.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available for students. There are various labs including Computer network lab, Internet of Things lab, Database Management System labs, Operating System lab, and Android lab to name a few. The facilities available are terrible. Food is terrible and not edible.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 1396 students were admitted at KSR Educational Institutions and 1263 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 1263 students 870 were placed with median salary of INR 157000 and 147 students opted for higher studies. A total of 1387 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at KSR Educational Institutionsand 1227 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 1227 students 876 were placed with median salary of INR 231000 and 282 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 268 students were admitted at KSR Educational Institutions and 249 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 249 students 43 were placed with median salary of INR 144000. A total of 194 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at KSR Educational Institutionsand 185 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 185 students 51 were placed with median salary of INR 213000 and 3 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year PG Degree, a total of 20 students were admitted at KSR Educational Institutions and 20 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 20 students 20 were placed with median salary of INR 3600000. A total of 20 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year PG degree at KSR Educational Institutionsand 19 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 19 students 19 were placed with median salary of INR 3600000.

student_insights.feedback: Many students started their own start-ups

faqs.answer: Here are some details about the TNEA cutoff for KSR Educational Institutions: The cutoff rank for MBA admission in 2024 was 3902 for the General AI quota candidates. The provisional allotment for BE/BTech courses for the TNEA SCA to SA Conversion Counselling 2024 has been released. Candidates can download their allotment order from the official website. KSR Educational Institutions accepts TNEA counselling. To be eligible for the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admission (TNEA), candidates must have completed the 12th grade. Candidates with Tamil Nadu diplomas can apply for lateral entry admission to B.Tech. To qualify for this, candidates must have completed a three-year engineering Diploma after class 10.

overview_faqs.question: Is KSR Educational Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: KSR Educational Institutions is a reputed institute for B.Ed, B.Tech, B.Com, After 1th Diploma, B.A., M.A., M.Sc., B.Sc., BBA, BCA, M.Ed, M.Com, BDS, MDS, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Teaching & Education, Engineering, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. KSR Educational Institutions has a review rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: KSR Educational Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.

content.Placements: In my course, 95% of students are placed. 29LPA is the highest salary package offered, 6LPA is the average salary package offered, and 3.8LPA is the lowest salary package offered. TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Colan Tech, Zoho, Dxc Technology, its all top recruiting companies, 90% of students got internship, mostly fresher roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Actually satisfied because of some faculty, good placements in 2024, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Above 99% of students are placed. The highest package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA. The Varsha Biotech company hired 10 students from our department, and 15 internships were secured in the Progen Biotechnology company. The top role offered in the course is developing a research person.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has pretty decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and have proper Wi-Fi and projectors. Labs are well-equipped, and the library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostels are comfortable, and Wi-Fi works fine. The mess food is okay, not great, but manageable. Sports facilities like basketball, football, and indoor games are available. Medical help is also there when needed. Overall, it's a good environment to study and live in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is good for my career.

content.Placements: Last year, more than 90 % of students got placed in highly reputed companies. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Mahendra, and Ashok Leyland. More than 70% of students got internships from the company. Top roles are designer, manufacturing sectors.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in our hostel. Hostel food is good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available. The library is available from 9am to 9 pm. The swimming pool is available for hostel students. Medical facilities are available at any emergency inside our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am currently in my first year and enjoy studying happily.

content.Placements: They offer excellent placement opportunities. In my department, a senior secured a position at TCS. The highest package is 10 lakhs per annum, while the lowest package at BOSCH is 5.5 lakhs per annum. Most students hold positions as HR managers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-constructed and creates a wonderful environment. They provide excellent Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food is of high quality and very hygienic. I enjoy eating all types of non-vegetarian foods. I am interested in running, and they provide me with great opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. Computer Science and Business Systems - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I enjoyed staying and studying here.

content.Placements: In the placement, 92.5% of the students are placed. The highest package is 12 lacs per annum and the lowest package is 3.5 lacs per annum, then the average package is 5.5 lacs per annum. In my department, more students are placed in TCS and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: We have a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The computer laboratory is connected to Wi-Fi. The classroom is very neat. Management provides very good. They provide sports coaching in the morning and evening. The hostel facilities are well and good. They provide non-veg which is very tasty and has quantity. They provide hospital facilities are emergency conditions.

admission_overview.college_name: KSR Educational Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: KSR Educational Institutions admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science and Teaching and Education.KSR Educational Institutionsadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, NEET, and NEET MDS. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 4,000 - 21,00,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 5 years.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at KSR Educational Institutions?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by KSR Educational Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, DCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at KSR Educational Institutions goes up to 2644.

faqs.question: What is the schedule for TNEA Counselling at SRM Easwari Engineering College?
faqs.answer: TNEA Rank List for various categories is out on the official website of TNEA. To check ranks candidates must login using the username and password. Grievances Redressal option is available till June. Further, the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE) Tamil Nadu released TNEA counselling dates and details. Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counselling registrations are ongoing, whereas the general TNEA Counselling process will start in July.TNEA counselling process includes registration, assignment of random numbers, certificate verifications, rank list publication, and finally the counselling. The counselling rounds will include steps like Choice Filling, Allotment, Confirmation of Allotment, and Reporting to the College/ TFC and payment of fees depending upon their confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in KSR Educational Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer: KSR Educational Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates passed graduation from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering in relevant stream from a recognised University.B.ComCandidates must have passed 10+2 with Commerce or Accountancy or Mathematics or Business Mathematics or Computer Science or Statistics or Business Statistics as one of the subjects or an examination from a recognised board.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class (SSLC/Matriculation) examination or equivalent qualification from any recognised board/council.B.A.Candidate must have passed in class 10+2 from a recognised board.M.A.Candidates must have passed any Bachelor degree of this University or any Bachelor degree of any Other University from any recognised Institute/ University.M.Sc.Candidates must have passed graduation B.Sc., Mathematics / B.Sc.,

description: KSR Educational Institutions cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the KSR Educational Institutions cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

KSR Educational Institutions TANCET cutoff 2025 is out for admission to the MCA course. The Round 1 cutoff for MCA admission is 2458 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 1479; whereas in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 2320 for the General AI quota. Comparing the latest year's first-round cutoff with the past two years, a fluctuating trend can be seen for MCA admission.

KSR Educational Institutions MCA cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The cutoff was released across different categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the TANCET first-round cutoff Rank stood at 2458 for MCA admission.
To view the cutoff details for other categories and rounds, aspirants can use the provided filters:

KSR Educational Institutions accepts the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) ranks, followed by a counselling process for admitting students to the MBA course. Candidates interested in taking admission to this institute must refer to the table below to check out the TANCET 2025 important dates to be eligible for admission.

Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) is a state-level entrance test for MBA and MCA courses in the colleges of Tamil Nadu. Candidates with a valid TANCET Rank are only eligible to appear in the counselling process. From the table below, students can view or download the round- and year-wise TANCET cutoff lists for KSR Educational Institutions.

Students can view the KSR Educational Institutions BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at KSR Educational Institutions was B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, with a cutoff rank of 56730.

Over the years, KSR Educational Institutions has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. KSR Educational Institutions's rankings in 'Colleges' category have exhibited stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. hostel_campus.college_name: KSR Educational Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: The TNEA application window 2025 for the BE/BTech courses will be opened in May 2025. The TNEA 2025 schedule is expected to be released soon.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.
reviews.review_text: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: Actually satisfied because of some faculty, good placements in 2024, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus has pretty decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and have proper Wi-Fi and projectors. Labs are well-equipped, and the library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostels are comfortable, and Wi-Fi works fine. The mess food is okay, not great, but manageable. Sports facilities like basketball, football, and indoor games are available. Medical help is also there when needed. Overall, it's a good environment to study and live in.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for my career.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our hostel. Hostel food is good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available. The library is available from 9am to 9 pm. The swimming pool is available for hostel students. Medical facilities are available at any emergency inside our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am currently in my first year and enjoy studying happily.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-constructed and creates a wonderful environment. They provide excellent Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food is of high quality and very hygienic. I enjoy eating all types of non-vegetarian foods. I am interested in running, and they provide me with great opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: I enjoyed staying and studying here.
reviews.review_text: We have a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The computer laboratory is connected to Wi-Fi. The classroom is very neat. Management provides very good. They provide sports coaching in the morning and evening. The hostel facilities are well and good. They provide non-veg which is very tasty and has quantity. They provide hospital facilities are emergency conditions.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy here. As per my suggestion, this college gives a great future.
reviews.review_text: My college looks like a green environment. They provide smart classrooms as a learning pathway for understanding concepts for the students easily. For the students, they provide a safe transport to reach home every day. They provide a specific laboratory for department-oriented facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the right place for improving skills and career, because of the advanced placement training.
reviews.review_text: Our campus always looks lush green, which gives it a look. More facilities are provided by the college, which are very useful for our career development. A hostel provides good and tasty food and an exciting menu.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has all the basic amenities that a college should have.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. Classrooms and other facilities, like labs and the idea lab to share our ideas and make an impact. The library is very useful because there are Readers Club and the Women Empowerment Club, like so on. Extracurricular activities like NCC, NSS, and other sports are encouraged here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. It conducts many events and sports for students.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The hostel food is very good. The hostel warden is strict and helpful for students. The college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed with the placement during my batch 2022.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, but the hostel will be average, and food will be okay only. Not much good. The facility in the hostel is also not much good, and the faculty and the way they treat us is also not good. Coming to food, is one of the worst experiences; otherwise, infrastructure, labs, and other things are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements need improvement. Canteen lacks variety, and bus services are poor.
reviews.review_text: Sports and extracurricular activities are much better than in other colleges, but the faculty members are local people with more egos. The faculty members are treating students with partiality. The management of hostels is good, and the mess is available with a variety of offers. The canteen needs to improve with more variety in food, and medical facilities should be much better. We have a dental block on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Students who selected KSR Educational Institution, their life is of full value and gain a better lif
reviews.review_text: KSR Educational Institutions holds a total of 15 colleges inside the institute. Infrastructure is beautiful. Wi-Fi is freely available in our college. Hospital and hostel are full of safety and security. The food is 100% safe and healthy, and 6 canteens are open at all times.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The food is good. Classrooms are good with good facilities. The mess, canteen, and medical facilities are good. Other facilities are also good. Facilities and infrastructure available in our department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it’s a good college for you to place in a reputed company.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. They provide many display halls to display their projects and review them. In our college, our hostel has good facilities and is cleanly maintained by the cleaners. The food in our hostel is good enough and daily has a different menu.

reviews.review_heading: "KSR College" Empowering students through quality education and community.
reviews.review_text: KSR College offers infrastructure for both courses and hostel accommodation. The classrooms are well-equipped, promoting an effective learning environment. Hostels provide comfortable living with essential amenities, ensuring students feel at home. The campus is clean and well-maintained, fostering a positive atmosphere. Overall, it's a conducive place for both academic and personal growth.
